eng: Im completing it with a secret plan that has been hidden for ages and generations but which has now been revealed to his holy people.
local: Tibɔtee di sá tin nìn bí dibalin doooo abin abin, báà ubɔ kaa béè ti-puee, ní kɔŋkɔnnee Unimbɔti bīitì ti-pu ki tīī u-nib.

eng: God wanted to make the glorious riches of this secret plan known among the Gentiles, which is Christ living in you, the hope of glory.
local: U nín là puee di sá bí béé tibɔbalkaalee nín cáá kunyaaŋŋu tikpil ki tīī bin kaa sá Juuda yabee puee yii: Kriisitoo bí ni-pɔbiliŋin ki yàntī ni máká yii ni làá dāá jī Unimbɔti nyooti.

eng: This is what we preach as we warn and teach every person with all wisdom so that we might present each one mature in Christ.
local: An puee, ti sòoǹ Yeesu Kriisitoo gbanti bɔti ki tìì unil sá kamaa, ki dù ti-ciiŋyi kɔkɔ ki dàkà ki kpáafí báà ŋma, bí ŋmā kí nīn sá binib bin bīńee, kun puee bi nì Yeesu Kriisitoo ŋá ubaanti.

eng: I work hard and struggle for this goal with his energy, which works in me powerfully.
local: Míǹ pu ní m gì ki dù mpɔŋkpaan ŋun Kriisitoo tìì-mee, mpɔn ŋun tūǹ ditundi man nee, ki cáa mɔ̀ dimool ni-pu.

eng: We always give thanks to God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, when we pray for you.
local: Ŋyunti sá kamaa, ti yaa pée bíi mèé ki tìì-nee, ti jáaḿ Unimbɔti ti-Dindaan Yeesu Kriisitoo Baa ni-pu.

eng: Weve done this since we heard of your faith in Christ Jesus and your love for all Gods people.
local: Di sá yii ti gbìl̄ ni nín cáá dimákal Yeesu Kriisitoo pu ki néeń Unimbɔti yab kɔkɔee.

eng: You have this faith and love because of the hope reserved for you in heaven. You previously heard about this hope through the true message, the good news.
local: Di sá yii ni dàkafī tipaal tin dɔ̄ ki cí-ni yilpuee pu. Ni béè an paati pu ŋyunti ŋun bi nìn péé péé ki sòon̄ nì ni ibaamɔn bɔtee.

eng: which has come to you. This message has been bearing fruit and growing among you since the day you heard and truly understood Gods grace, in the same way that it is bearing fruit and growing in the whole world.
local: Tibɔmɔntiil gbanti tin bi cáań-nee bíi gbìtī ki lòoǹ abimɔnti ajan kɔkɔ nib cee. Míǹ ní tì túń atunnyaan ni-cee, kí yòon̄ doooo ŋyunti ŋun ni nìn péé péé ki fōō-tì ki lafun béè Unimbɔti nín ŋáań binib tiŋan tiŋyee.

eng: You learned it from Epaphras, who is the fellow slave we love and Christs faithful minister for your sake.
local: Tíǹ ní Eepafrasi nìn dàkā-ni. Úǹ di sá ti-tɔntɔnjuti un ti néeńee, ki tūǹ Kriisitoo tundi deedee ki tútúǹ-ni.

eng: He informed us of your love in the Spirit.
local: U máafì-ti dineendi din Circir Fam yàntī ni cáá Unimbɔti yab puee.

eng: Because of this, since the day we heard about you, we havent stopped praying for you and asking for you to be filled with the knowledge of Gods will, with all wisdom and spiritual understanding.
local: Míǹ puee, kí yòon̄ daliŋkin ti gbìl̄ ni-puee, ti mun pée bí ki mèé kaa gbèentí ki tìì-ni yii Unimbɔti ń yàntī ní béé mmɔntiim tin u là ní ŋée, kí tīī-ni iciin kɔkɔ nì dinyil din Unimbɔti Fam tììyee ní gbìl̄ u-bɔti taapu.

eng: I want you to know how much I struggle for you, for those in Laodicea, and for all who havent known me personally.
local: M nyàab̀ ní béé yii m bíi mɔ̀ dimool an pɔ̄ɔ̄, nimbi nì Lawoodiisee yab nì bin kɔkɔ kaa láá pée ká-mi dalbee pu.

eng: And you have been filled by him, who is the head of every ruler and authority.
local: ní nimbi kāntí tikɔkɔ u-cee, kun puee úǹ di sá ubɔti tin kɔkɔ cáá ipɔnee pu.

eng: In him you were also circumcised with a circumcision not administered by human hands. The circumcision of Christ is realized in the stripping away of the whole self dominated by sin.
local: Ŋyunti ŋun ni nì Yeesu Kriisitoo ŋá ubaantee, u gíí-ni nì digiil din kaa sá tiwun gíitamee, ki gíí ki lēē ni-bimbikpitim.

eng: You were buried with him through baptism and raised with him through faith in the power of God, who raised him from the dead.
local: Kii bi nín síb̀ bin kúùyee puee, míǹ ní ni nì Kriisitoo nìn kpíì, ní bi síb́-ni ŋyunti ŋun bi nìn fùl̄-ni Unimbɔti nyimee. Boonee, ni nì u fīkitì, kun puee ni fōō ki kíí yii Unimbɔti cáá mpɔŋkpaan ki ŋúń ki fīkitì Kriisitoo.

eng: When you were dead because of the things you had done wrong and because your body wasnt circumcised, God made you alive with Christ and forgave all the things you had done wrong.
local: Dooooyee, ni-kpitii pu, nì ni nín kaa sá Juuda yab kaa gíí dikpancandee puee, naa nìn cáá dimaŋfal. Kɔŋkɔnnee, ni nì Kriisitoo nín ŋá ubaantee puee, Unimbɔti fīkitì-ni. U dū ti-kpitii kɔkɔ ki pú-ti.

eng: He destroyed the record of the debt we owed, with its requirements that worked against us. He canceled it by nailing it to the cross.
local: ní ki fōō kugbɔŋu kun poon bi nìn ŋmàn̄ ti-kpitii ki bóob́ yii bí dáaĺ ti-tafalee, ki kpītì ki dū ki kpáá Yeesu dɔpuntikaaŋu pu.

eng: When he disarmed the rulers and authorities, he exposed them to public disgrace by leading them in a triumphal parade.
local: Unimbɔti gbákal̀ arasiniibi nì ŋfaŋkpitim pɔŋyi. U cáań-bi ki dàkā báà ŋma ń kpèè bin pu u jíń dinyandee. U-Jipɔɔn dɔpuntikaaŋuee di sá u-nyandi gbanti.

eng: So dont let anyone judge you about eating or drinking or about a festival, a new moon observance, or sabbaths.
local: Mimmee, bi yaa bíi sòoǹ ni-pu yii naa kòó tijikaal tiba, kaa kòó tinyɔkaal tiba mun, nì ni nín kaa kàal̀ iwiin in bi nìn yóoǹee, kaa kàal̀ iŋmapɔɔn nì iwiŋŋuŋfikaa puee, ní taa yàntī án nīn páb́-ni.

eng: These religious practices are only a shadow of what was coming—the body that cast the shadow is Christ.
local: Di sá yii akoobilee di nìn dàkà tin dáá bí boon ki dòońee, an dàkà yii Kriisitoo.

eng: Dont let anyone who wants to practice harsh self-denial and worship angels rob you of the prize. They go into detail about what they have seen in visions and have become unjustifiably arrogant by their selfish way of thinking.
local: Ubɔ ń taa ŋmàtiǹ-ni yii ni yīntì ni nín kaa là kí sìntī ni-ba taapu kí nīn jáaḿ Unimbɔti tuuŋyee. Di sá bi là kí lì yii bíǹ wāĺ ní. Ama baa máaǹ kí dàkà bi-ba kii bi nín yòontí bi-ba yilpu min nee, kun puee bi-landɔkɔi nyēeń bi-bimbikpitimin ní ki sá nniyaamin.

eng: They dont stay connected to the head. The head nourishes and supports the whole body through the joints and ligaments, so the body grows with a growth that is from God.
local: Baa ŋúb́ Yeesu Kriisitoo bɔti. Úǹ di sá diyil ki tīī tiwun kɔkɔ, ki tūkuntí akpab ní ki nɔ̀b̀ igiin, ki kpīintí tiwun ki yàntī tí nīn wīintí kii Unimbɔti nín là puee.

eng: My goal is that their hearts would be encouraged and united together in love so that they might have all the riches of assurance that come with understanding, so that they might have the knowledge of the secret plan of God, namely Christ.
local: Di sá yii m là bí ká kunyannyaau bi-pɔbiliŋin, kí nīn néeń tɔb, kí nīn cáá nnyɔɔpee, kí nīn nyí an kɔkɔ taapu kí nīn cáá dimákal mmɔntiim. Mimmee, bi làá béé tin tin Unimbɔti nìn ŋúb́ dibalinee mbaamɔm, an dàkà yii Yeesu Kriisitoo.

eng: If you died with Christ to the way the world thinks and acts, why do you submit to rules and regulations as though you were living in the world?.
local: Ni nì Kriisitoo nín kpíì, u fīī-ni ki nyántì-ni duulinya marabinee, ba ŋá ní ni bí kii ni gíti sá taapu doo yabee? Ba ŋá ní ni gbíntìi dì akoobil ŋin sá yii.

eng: Dont handle! Dont taste! Dont touch.
local: «Taa cúú doo, taa dáká tinee, taa gbēē tin kíǹee.».

eng: All these things cease to exist when they are used. Such rules are human commandments and teachings.
local: An bɔtee sá binib marab nì bi-dàkatam ní. Ni yaa gíti dáá dū tijin gbanti ki jíńee, tì bíil̀ dee, an kaa cáá yii án làá ŋá-ni tiba.

eng: They look like they are wise with this self-made religion and their self-denial by the harsh treatment of the body, but they are no help against indulging in selfish immoral behavior.
local: Ibaamɔn, a yaa kpēē marab gbantee, a làá lì yii bi cáá iciin ŋyunti ŋun bi bí yii binib ń dī dipɔ́ɔǹdi saŋŋu, kí sìntī bi-ba taapu, kí yàntī án píĺ bi-wuntee, ama marabee kaa cáá mpɔn kí cúú tiwun ń taa ŋá min kaa kítèe.

eng: All the treasures of wisdom and knowledge are hidden in him.
local: un ni ní iciin nì dinyil kɔkɔ bál̀ ki kēe.

eng: Im telling you this so that no one deceives you with convincing arguments.
local: M tùkù-ni tibɔti nee ní kpèè tiŋan, ubɔ ń taa dū kinyɔɔmɔɔi kí ŋmàtiǹ-ni.

eng: because even though I am absent physically, Im with you in spirit. Im happy to see the discipline and stability of your faith in Christ.
local: Báà m yaa kaa bí ni-kansikin, m-landɔkɔŋu bí ni-cee, ní an mɔ̄ǹ-mi m nín ká yii ni kpáfì mbaantiim ki sí deedee ki gbíntìi cáá dimákal Yeesu Kriisitoo puee.

eng: So live in Christ Jesus the Lord in the same way as you received him.
local: Kii ni nín nìn fōō ti-Dindaan Yeesu Kriisitoo puee, ní nīn gbíntìi nóó-u míǹ.

eng: Be rooted and built up in him, be established in faith, and overflow with thanksgiving just as you were taught.
local: Ní báań inyaan u-ni kí nīn wīintí, kí nīn ŋúb́ tin bi nìn dàkā-ni ni fōō ki kííyee mpɔn, kí nīn jáaḿ-u u-ŋanti pu tikpil.

eng: See to it that nobody enslaves you with philosophy and foolish deception, which conform to human traditions and the way the world thinks and acts rather than Christ.
local: Ní kpèè tiŋan ubɔ ń taa dū u-nyil nì u-bɔfanti tin tɔ́kɔ́ binib koobiliŋ nì duulinya marab pu kaa tɔ́kɔ́ Kriisitoo puee kí ŋmàtiǹ-ni.

eng: All the fullness of deity lives in Christs body.
local: Di sá yii Unimbɔti bimbim kɔkɔ bí Kriisitoo wuntin.

eng: Therefore, if you were raised with Christ, look for the things that are above where Christ is sitting at Gods right side.
local: Ama ni yaa nyí yii Kriisitoo kpáaǹ-ni ki kpíì ki fīkitèe, nín̄ nyàab̀maan tin bí yilpuee, laakin úǹ bí ki kā Unimbɔti ŋaŋgiil púee.

eng: and put on the new nature, which is renewed in knowledge by conforming to the image of the one who created it.
local: ní ki yōoǹ mbimbipɔm min pɔ̀ntī baabadal ki cá ki nántíǹ Unimbɔti un náań-mèe nín bí puee. Mimmee, án làá yàntī ní béé ni-Nimbɔtiuee mbaamɔm.

eng: In this image there is neither Greek nor Jew, circumcised nor uncircumcised, barbarian, Scythian, slave nor free, but Christ is all things and in all people.
local: Míǹ puee, a yaa sá Juuda yɔuaaa, a yaa kaa sáaa, a yaa gíí dikpancandaaa, a yaa kaa gííyaaa, a yaa sá unicaanaaa, a yaa tí sá umɔnilaaa, a yaa sá uyumbuɔɔɔ, a yaa tí tɔ́ a-baaa, tíǹ kaa páb́. Un baba bɔti páb́ee di sá Kriisitoo un bí báà ŋmanee.

eng: Therefore, as Gods choice, holy and loved, put on compassion, kindness, humility, gentleness, and patience.
local: Nimbi bin Unimbɔti lútì, ni kpántì u-yab bin u néeńee, ní nīn sūm̀maan tɔb saai kí nīn ŋáań tɔb tiŋan kí nīn sìntīǹ ni-ba taapu ki tìì tɔb, kí nīn cáá kimɔtii.

eng: Be tolerant with each other and, if someone has a complaint against anyone, forgive each other. As the Lord forgave you, so also forgive each other.
local: Ní nīn ŋúb́maan tɔb. Ni-jutiibi yaa yīntiǹ-nee, ní nīn cáa pūǹ-bi. Kii ti-Dindaan nín dū ni-kpitii ki pú-ni puee, ni mun ń nīn cáa pūm̀maan tɔb míǹ mbaantiim.

eng: And over all these things put on love, which is the perfect bond of unity.
local: Tin páb́ ki jítiǹ tikɔkɔee di sá ní nīn néeń tɔb. Míǹ ní ni làá ŋmā kí nīn cáá nnyɔɔpee tiŋman pu.

eng: The peace of Christ must control your hearts—a peace into which you were called in one body. And be thankful people.
local: Yàntīmaan ŋgbansɔŋfi ŋun Kriisitoo tììyee ń nīn kpòotī ni-pɔbiliŋ. Di sá yii ŋúǹ pu ní Unimbɔti yíiń-ni ki kpáfì kii tiwumbaantiilee. Ní nīn jáaḿ Unimbɔti tiŋan tin u ŋáań ki tìì-nee pu.

eng: The word of Christ must live in you richly. Teach and warn each other with all wisdom by singing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs. Sing to God with gratitude in your hearts.
local: Kriisitoo bɔtee nì tì-gaajati kɔkɔ ń nīn bí ni-cee mmɔntiimin. Ní nīn dàkà tɔb u-bɔtee kí nīn kpáafímaan tɔb nì iciimmɔnti, kí nīn gà ilan nì ni-pɔbiliŋ kɔkɔ, ilan in kā Inyɔŋki laŋyi gbɔŋku poonee nì Kriisitoo nikitil laŋyi nì ilan in Unimbɔti Fam tìì-nee kí nīn cáa pàkà Unimbɔti u-ŋanti pu.

eng: Whatever you do, whether in speech or action, do it all in the name of the Lord Jesus and give thanks to God the Father through him.
local: Tin kamaa ni yaa làá lèe nì tin kamaa ni yaa làá ŋée, ŋámaan an kɔkɔ nì ti-Dindaan Yeesu pu, kí nīn dìmaan u-pu ki jáaḿ ti-Baa Unimbɔti.

eng: Wives, submit to your husbands in a way that is appropriate in the Lord.
local: Nimbi binimpoobee, nín̄ tɔ́maan ni-calib, min máaǹ ti-Dindaan yab ń ŋée dee.

eng: Husbands, love your wives and dont be harsh with them.
local: Nimbi bininjabee, nín̄ néeḿmaan ni-nimpoobi, kí taa nín̄ cáá bi-pu ntoom.

eng: Think about the things above and not things on earth.
local: Dūmaan ni-landɔkɔi kí dūú tɔ̄ yilpu wanti pu, kí taa dūú tɔ̄ taapu yati pu.

eng: Children, obey your parents in everything, because this pleases the Lord.
local: Nimbi mbiyaamuee, an sá ni-tundi yii ní nīn gbìlim̀maan ni-baabi nì ni-nab nyɔmmu ŋyunti sá kamaa, míǹ di sá min fáatiǹ ti-Dindaanee.

eng: Parents, dont provoke your children in a way that ends up discouraging them.
local: Nimbi bibaatiibee, ní taa nín̄ páb́ ni-biyaamu tikpil, mu-wunti ń yɔ̀tī.

eng: Slaves, obey your masters on earth in everything. Dont just obey like people pleasers when they are watching. Instead, obey with the single motivation of fearing the Lord.
local: Nimbi iyumbuee, ní nīn gbìlim̀maan bin sá ni-dindambi taapu dooyee nyɔmmu iyunti kɔkɔ. Ní taa nín̄ tūǹ ditundi min fáatì-bee ŋyunti ŋun bi kpèé-nee ŋmaniŋma, ama ní nīn tūǹ bi-tuuŋŋi nì dipɔbil diba kii ni nín fàŋkí ti-Dindaan puee.

eng: Whatever you do, do it from the heart for the Lord and not for people.
local: Báà ditundi din ní an yaa yāntì ki sée, tɔ̄maan-dì nì ni-pɔbiliŋ kɔkɔ, a lì kii ti-Dindaan ní ni tūǹ ki tìì, an kaa sá nnibiyaamuee.

eng: You know that you will receive an inheritance as a reward. You serve the Lord Christ.
local: Ní nīn nyí yii ti-Dindaan làá dāá pà-ni tipaal tin sá kutindaŋuee. Di sá yii ni-Dindaan un ni baasii tūǹ ditundi ki tììyee di sá Kriisitoo.

eng: But evildoers will receive their reward for their evil actions. There is no discrimination.
local: Un yaa ŋá ikpitee làá ká ikpiti paati, kun puee ti-Dindaan gbanti kaa gàntī binib.

eng: You died, and your life is hidden with Christ in God.
local: Di sá yii ni kpíì, ní ni-maŋfal bál̀ Kriisitoo ni Unimbɔti cee.

eng: When Christ, who is your life, is revealed, then you also will be revealed with him in glory.
local: Kriisitoo un sá ni-maŋfalee yaa láa páaǹnée, ni mun dāa pāantiń ní ki cáá tinyool kii úŋ̀wuee.

eng: So put to death the parts of your life that belong to the earth, such as sexual immorality, moral corruption, lust, evil desire, and greed .
local: Mimmee, kpɔ̀maan taapu doo bimbikpitim min bí ni-nee, tin sá tilaakpaal nì tijɔkɔndi, ilandɔkɔkpiti nì nnimbitaataam min nì iwaatooti sá tiwambaantiilee.

eng: The wrath of God is coming upon disobedient people because of these things.
local: Ikpiti gbanti pu ní Unimbɔti làá dáaĺ bin kaa tɔ́-uee tafal.

eng: You used to live this way, when you were alive to these things.
local: Míǹ ní ni nìn ŋáań dooooyee, ŋyunti ŋun ni nìn dáá bí ikpitinee.

eng: But now set aside these things, such as anger, rage, malice, slander, and obscene language.
local: Ama kɔŋkɔnnee, ní fámaan ikpiti kɔkɔ, kí taa nín̄ fòol̄ mbiim, kí taa nín̄ cáá diŋuul nì tilandɔkɔkpiil. Ní taa yàntī asiibil nì tibɔfan ń nīn nyēē ni-nyɔmmun.

eng: Dont lie to each other. Take off the old human nature with its practices.
local: Ní taa nín̄ mɔ́ntímaan tɔb. Di sá yii ni fá ni-bimbikpitim nì atuun ŋin ni nìn ŋáań dooooyee kɔkɔwoooo.

eng: Masters, be just and fair to your slaves, knowing that you yourselves have a master in heaven.
local: Nimbi bin cáá iyumbuee, ní nīn ŋúb́-i mmɔntiimin, kí nīn ŋáań-i tiŋan, kí nīn nyí yii ni mun cáá ukpil ubɔ u bí yilpu.

eng: Aristarchus, my fellow prisoner, says hello to you. So does Mark, Barnabas cousin .
local: Ariistaarki man nì un bí sarkan dooyee jáamiń-ni, ní Maarki Baarnaabaasi naal mun tīiń-ni ijaam. Dooooyee, bi tùkū-ni Maarki gbanti bɔti ki yóoǹ. Mimmee, u yaa láa bāań ni-ceeyee, ní dāá fōō-u mmɔntiim.

eng: Jesus, called Justus, also says hello. These are my only fellow workers for Gods kingdom who are Jewish converts. They have been an encouragement to me.
local: Yeesu un bi yíì Justuusee mun jáamiń-ni. Juuda yab kansikinee, binib bita nee baba di sá man nì bin tūǹ ditundi Unimbɔti Beel ń cù nyɔkɔpuee. Bíǹ di tìì-mi kunyannyaau.

eng: Epaphras, who is one of you, says hello. Hes a slave of Christ Jesus who always wrestles for you in prayers so that you will stand firm and be fully mature and complete in the entire will of God.
local: Ni-yɔu Eepafrasi, Yeesu Kriisitoo tɔntɔnliuee, mun tīiń-ni ijaam. U mèé ni-pu tikpil ŋyunti sá kamaa, kaa gbèentí, yii ní nīn gbíntìi ŋúb́ Yeesu Kriisitoo bɔti mmɔntiim kí wíiǹ kí kpántí biniŋmambi, kí ŋmā kí ŋá tin kɔkɔ Unimbɔti là ní ŋée.

eng: I can vouch for him that he has worked hard for you and for those in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
local: Mama m-ba ŋūǹ kí lì u-pu yii u gì nimbi nì Lawoodiisee yab nì Eerapooliisi yab pu digìńdi.

eng: Luke, the dearly loved physician, and Demas say hello.
local: Luuki, ti-nabineeŋkaaki un sá dɔkɔtee, nì Deemasi jáamiń-ni.

eng: Say hello to the brothers and sisters in Laodicea, along with Nympha and the church that meets in her house.
local: Ní jāam̀ nnabiyaamu mun bí Lawoodiiseeyee, nì Niŋfasi, kí kpáaǹ Kriisitoo nikitil din kpáfí u-dumpuee.

eng: After this letter has been read to you publicly, make sure that the church in Laodicea reads it and that you read the one from Laodicea.
local: Ni yaa kàan̄ kugbɔŋu nee ki tīī ni-yab ki dóòyee, ní dūú tīī Kriisitoo nikitil din bí Lawoodiiseeyee mun ń kàaǹ. Míǹ ní Lawoodiisee yab yaa tīiń-ni bi-yɔkuee ní kàaǹ ku mun.

eng: And tell Archippus, See to it that you complete the ministry that you received in the Lord.
local: Ní tùkù Arkiipi yii ú kpèè soooo kí tɔ̄ ditundi din ti-Dindaan tīī-uee tiŋan.

eng: I, Paul, am writing this greeting personally. Remember that Im in prison. Grace be with you.
local: Man Pɔɔl di dū m-ŋal ki ŋmàn̄ anyɔɔbun nee ki jáaḿ-ni. - Taa súntímaan yii m bí sarkan. - Unimbɔti ŋanti ń nīn bí ni-pu.

eng: Keep on praying and guard your prayers with thanksgiving.
local: Ní nīn mèé múlmul kí taa gbèen̄, kí nīn wálifì kí nīn jáaḿ Unimbɔti u-ŋanti pu.

eng: At the same time, pray for us also. Pray that God would open a door for the word so we can preach the secret plan of Christ—which is why Im in chains.
local: Ni yaa bíi mèéyee, ní nīn mèé ki tìì ti mun, yii Unimbɔti ń pìitī-ti nsan tí ŋmā kí sòoǹ u-bɔti kí bìitī tibɔbalkaal tin sá Kriisitoo yatee. Tibɔti gbanti pu ní m bí sarkan nee.

eng: Pray that I might be able to make it as clear as I ought to when I preach.
local: Ní nīn mèé yii ḿ ŋmā kí nīn sòoǹ ki cántí-tì kii an nín máaǹ puee.

eng: Act wisely toward outsiders, making the most of the opportunity.
local: Ni-bimbiminee, ní nīn cáá iciin bin kaa láá fōō ki kííyee cee, kí taa dū iyunti in ni kāntí bi-ceeyee kí bīil̀.

eng: Your speech should always be gracious and sprinkled with insight so that you may know how to respond to every person.
local: Ní nīn sòoǹ anyɔɔbummɔɔn ŋí nīn cáá taapu, kí nīn nyí min ní ni làá nīn kíikí báà ŋma án nīn kítèe.

eng: Tychicus, our dearly loved brother, faithful minister, and fellow slave in the Lord, will inform you about everything that has happened to me.
local: An yaa sá m-bɔtee, ti-nabineeŋkaaki Tiisiiki, un sá ti-tɔntɔnjuti ki tūǹ ditundi mmɔntiim ki tìì ti-Dindaanee, làá sòoǹ nì ni tin kɔkɔ m cááyee.

eng: This is why I sent him to you, so that youll know all about us and so he can encourage your hearts.
local: An pu ní m túnní-u ni-cee ní béé ti-gbampɔŋŋu pu kí ká kunyannyaau.

eng: I sent him with Onesimus, our faithful and dearly loved brother, who is one of you. They will let you know about everything here.
local: Úǹ nì ti-nabineeŋkaaki Ooneesiim un yú deedee ki sá ni-yɔu ubɔee làá dāá nīn táań, kí dāá tùkù-ni tin kɔkɔ bíi jītí dooyee.

eng: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus by Gods will. To the holy and faithful people in Christ Jesus in Ephesus.
local: Man Pɔɔl un Unimbɔti lēē ḿ nīn sá Yeesu Kriisitoo kpambalee di ŋmàn̄ kugbɔŋu nee. M ŋmàn̄-ku kí tīī nimbi Unimbɔti yab bin kóò Eefeesi tiŋkin ki yú deedee, ni nì Yeesu Kriisitoo ŋá ubaantee ní.

eng: This is what God planned for the climax of all times: to bring all things together in Christ, the things in heaven along with the things on earth.
local: Tin u lēē kí ŋée di sá, ŋyunti yaa láa sāāyee, ú dāá kóoǹ tin bí yilpuee nì tin bí taapuee kɔkɔ kí kpāfì, Kriisitoo baba ń nīn sá ubɔti.

eng: We have also received an inheritance in Christ. We were destined by the plan of God, who accomplishes everything according to his design.
local: Unimbɔti ŋáań tikɔkɔ kii u nín lēē ki là kí ŋá miŋyee ní, di sá yii u lútì-ti ki yóoǹ dooooyee tí nīn sá u-yab, ti nì Kriisitoo nín ŋá ubaantee pu.

eng: We are called to be an honor to Gods glory because we were the first to hope in Christ.
local: Mimmee, timbi bin sá bipeepeekaabi ki máká Kriisitoo puee, tí nīn pàkà-u u-nyooti pu.

eng: You too heard the word of truth in Christ, which is the good news of your salvation. You were sealed with the promised Holy Spirit because you believed in Christ.
local: Nimbee, ni gbìl̄ ibaamɔn bɔti tin sá Kriisitoo Bɔmɔntiiti ki cáań-ni difiilee. Ni nín fōō ki kííyee pu, ní Unimbɔti dū u-daaŋku ki dáań-ni. Kudaaŋŋuee di sá Circir Fam min u nìn pōoǹee.

eng: The Holy Spirit is the down payment on our inheritance, which is applied toward our redemption as Gods own people, resulting in the honor of Gods glory.
local: U-Fam min u tīī-tee di dàkà yii difakal din u pōoǹ kí tīī-tee dáá bíń boon ki dòoń ti làá fōō-dì. Mì tīī-ti dimákal yii ti làá dāá fōō difakalee ŋyunti ŋun Unimbɔti yaa láa nyántì u-yab kɔkɔ doo ki cáa cūnnì u-ceeyee. U ŋá míǹ tí nīn pàkà-u u-nyooti pu ní.

eng: Since I heard about your faith in the Lord Jesus and your love for all Gods people, this is the reason that.
local: An puee, m nín gbìl̄ bi sòoǹ ni-fookiiu un ni cáá ti-Dindaan Yeesu puee, nì dineendi din ni cáá Unimbɔti yab kɔkɔ puee.

eng: I dont stop giving thanks to God for you when I remember you in my prayers.
local: m yaa bíi mèéyee m jáaḿ Unimbɔti ni-pu múlmul.

eng: I pray that the God of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of glory, will give you a spirit of wisdom and revelation that makes God known to you.
local: M mèé ti-Baa tinyooldaan un sá ti-Dindaan Yeesu Kriisitoo Nimbɔtiuee ú tīī-ni iciin ní ŋmā kí béé-u, kí nīn nyí un Unimbɔti sée.

eng: I pray that the eyes of your heart will have enough light to see what is the hope of Gods call, what is the richness of Gods glorious inheritance among believers.
local: M gíti mèé-u yii ú ŋmíntí-ni ní wāl̀ tiwammɔntiil tin pu u yíiń-nee, ní béé tigaajati tin u kpáafì ki yóoǹ nimbi bin sá u-yabee nín wīikí ki cáá tinyool puee.

eng: and what is the overwhelming greatness of Gods power that is working among us believers. This power is conferred by the energy of Gods powerful strength.
local: ní béé u-pɔŋkpaaŋŋu ŋun jítiǹ tikɔkɔ u cáa tūǹ timbi bin fōō-u ki kííyee pu atuunee. U-pɔŋkpaaŋŋu gbanti mbaantee ní u dàkā.

eng: Grace and peace to you from God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Ti-Baa Unimbɔti nì ti-Dindaan Yeesu Kriisitoo ń ŋá-ni tiŋan kí tīī-ni ŋgbansɔŋfi.

eng: Gods power was at work in Christ when God raised him from the dead and sat him at Gods right side in the heavens.
local: ŋyunti ŋun u nìn fīkitì Kriisitoo ditaŋkpiilin ki yāntì u cūtìi kāl̀ u-ŋaŋgiil pú yilpuee.

eng: far above every ruler and authority and power and angelic power, any power that might be named not only now but in the future.
local: Niin ní Kriisitoo tɔ́kɔ́ tikɔkɔ pu ki jīǹ dibeel biyidambi nì bibɔtiibi nì bipɔndambi kɔkɔ pu. Báà an yaa yāntì ki sá uŋyee, úǹ di jítiǹ báà ŋma duulinya un poon ti bí nee, nì un dáá bíń ki dòońee mun poon.

eng: God put everything under Christs feet and made him head of everything in the church.
local: Unimbɔti dū tikɔkɔ ní ki ŋá Kriisitoo taapu. U dū-u tɔ́kɔǹ tikɔkɔ pu ní ki dū-u ki ŋá Kriisitoo Nikitil yil.

eng: which is his body. His body, the church, is the fullness of Christ, who fills everything in every way.
local: Kriisitoo Nikitil di sá Kriisitoo wunti. Dinikitilee ni ní Kriisitoo bí gbīŋgbim ní Unimbɔti bí Kriisitoo ni mmɔm.

eng: Bless the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ! He has blessed us in Christ with every spiritual blessing that comes from heaven.
local: Ti jáaḿ Unimbɔti un sá ti-Dindaan Yeesu Kriisitoo Baayee u nín ŋá-ti tiŋan tin, ki dī u-Fam pu ki tīī-ti yilpu wammɔntiiti kɔkɔ ti nì Yeesu Kriisitoo nín ŋá ubaantee puee.

eng: God chose us in Christ to be holy and blameless in Gods presence before the creation of the world.
local: Di sá yii, kí wàatī Unimbɔti ń náań duulinyee, u pée lútì-ti ki yóoǹ tí nīn sá u-yab, ti nì Kriisitoo ń ŋá ubaanti, tí nīn bí circir, ú taa ká ti-pu ikpiti iba. Unimbɔti neendi puee.

eng: God destined us to be his adopted children through Jesus Christ because of his love. This was according to his goodwill and plan.
local: ní u nìn pée lēē ki yóoǹ dooooyee yii, Yeesu Kriisitoo puee, u làá dāá dū-ti kí kpántí u-biyaamu. Di sá yii an nìn ŋān̄ u-cee ú ŋá míǹ.

eng: and to honor his glorious grace that he has given to us freely through the Son whom he loves.
local: án nīn sá-u tinyool, tiŋaŋkpaandi tin u dī u-Jipɔnneeŋkaau pu ki ŋá ki tīī-tee pu.

eng: We have been ransomed through his Sons blood, and we have forgiveness for our failures based on his overflowing grace.
local: Kun puee, Kriisitoo kúm pu ní u fīī-ti ki nyántì tikpitilin, ní ki dū ti-kpitii ki pú-ti. U ŋá míǹ kí dàkà-ti u-neendi nín wīikí min bulifee ní.

eng: which he poured over us with wisdom and understanding.
local: U-neendi gbanti nín wīikí tikpil puee, ní u tīī-ti iciin nì dinyil.

eng: God revealed his hidden design to us, which is according to his goodwill and the plan that he intended to accomplish through his Son.
local: Di sá yii u yāntì ti béè u nín là kí dī Kriisitoo pu kí ŋá tin nìn bí dibalin dooooyee.

eng: At one time you were like a dead person because of the things you did wrong and your offenses against God.
local: Dooooyee, ni nín nìn yìntī ki ŋáań ikpiti iŋyee puee, ni nìn kpíì Unimbɔti nimbiin.

eng: Instead, we are Gods accomplishment, created in Christ Jesus to do good things. God planned for these good things to be the way that we live our lives.
local: Kun puee ti sá Unimbɔti wannaaŋkaati ní. Ti nín ŋá ubaanti nì Yeesu Kriisitooyee ní u fātìi náań-ti mpɔm, tí ŋmā kí nīn tūǹ atummɔnti ŋin u nìn bɔ́ntì ki yóoǹ tí nīn tūǹee.

eng: So remember that once you were Gentiles by physical descent, who were called uncircumcised by Jews who are physically circumcised.
local: An puee, ní téetímaan dooooyee ni nín nìn bí miŋyee. Naa sá Juuda yab maaliŋun, nimbi ní Juuda yab bin gífí akpancanee yíì yii bin kaa gífée.

eng: At that time you were without Christ. You were aliens rather than citizens of Israel, and strangers to the covenants of Gods promise. In this world you had no hope and no God.
local: Téetímaan yii, ŋyunti gbantee, naa nìn dáá nyí Kriisitoo, ni nìn sá binicambi ní. Naa nìn sá Isirayeel tindambiyaamu. Unimbɔti nín nìn ŋá mpèé nì u-yab ki pōoǹ-bi dipoondee, ni nìn kpá poon. Ni nìn bí duulinyan kaa nyí Unimbɔti, kaa cɔ́tí tiba mun pu.

eng: But now, thanks to Christ Jesus, you who once were so far away have been brought near by the blood of Christ.
local: Ama nimbi bin nìn dátiǹ-uee, kɔŋkɔnnee ni nì Yeesu Kriisitoo nín ŋá ubaantee, ni sútìń ki pìl̄-u Kriisitoo kúm pu.

eng: Christ is our peace. He made both Jews and Gentiles into one group. With his body, he broke down the barrier of hatred that divided us.
local: Di sá yii úǹ Kriisitoo di sá timbi gbansɔŋfiŋu. Úǹ di yāntì Juuda yab nì bin kaa sá Juuda yabee kpántì dinibubaantiil. Di sá yii kináŋ nìn pītì ti-kansikin kii digundee, ní u dū u-maŋfal ki tīī ki wīī digundee.

eng: He canceled the detailed rules of the Law so that he could create one new person out of the two groups, making peace.
local: U kpītì Juuda yab marab nì tin bi nìn pée ŋáańee kɔkɔ. Ti nì u nín ŋá ubaantee pu ní u dū anibul alee ki ŋá dinibubaantiil din sá dipɔndee, ní ki cáań-ti ŋgbansɔŋfi.

eng: He reconciled them both as one body to God by the cross, which ended the hostility to God.
local: Kriisitoo kúm ndɔpuntikaa pu di kúntì kináŋ, ki cāntì Juuda yab nì bin kaa sá Juuda yabee kpántì tiwumbaantiil, bi nì Unimbɔti mɔ́ɔkì.

eng: When he came, he announced the good news of peace to you who were far away from God and to those who were near.
local: U dɔ́miń duulinyan ki sòon̄ dipɔɔsɔŋkil bɔti ki tīī nimbi bin kaa sá Juuda yab ki dátiǹ Unimbɔtee, nì timbi bin sá Juuda yab ki pìlīǹ-uee mun.

eng: We both have access to the Father through Christ by the one Spirit.
local: Di sá yii Kriisitoo pu ní timbi bin sá Juuda yabee nì nimbi bin kaa sée kɔkɔ ŋūǹ kí bà ti-Baa Unimbɔti nì u-Fam mbaantiim tūtuntam pu.

eng: So now you are no longer strangers and aliens. Rather, you are fellow citizens with Gods people, and you belong to Gods household.
local: Míǹ puee naa ti sá binicambi, kaa ti sá bin nyánní laabee. Ni kpántì ntindambiyaamu kii bin sá Unimbɔti yabee nín sá puee ní, ní ki sá Unimbɔti dicaŋkun yab.

eng: You used to live like people of this world. You followed the rule of a destructive spiritual power. This is the spirit of disobedience to Gods will that is now at work in persons whose lives are characterized by disobedience.
local: Ni nìn ŋáań kii duulinya yab nín pée ŋáań puee ní, ki nóó arasiniibi bɔtiu un bí kutaa pu ki yàntī nnibiyaamu kaa tɔ́ Unimbɔtee.

eng: As Gods household, you are built on the foundation of the apostles and prophets with Christ Jesus himself as the cornerstone.
local: Ni sá kudii ní, ní kudiiyee nín tɔ́kɔ́ ataŋkpee ŋin puee di sá Yeesu Kriisitoo kpambaliŋ nì Unimbɔti bɔnaatiliibi, ní Yeesu sá ditaŋkpal din yì kudiiyee pɔŋŋuee.

eng: The whole building is joined together in him, and it grows up into a temple that is dedicated to the Lord.
local: Úǹ di yì-tì ní kudiiyee yú ki pɔ̄ɔ̄ ní ki wīintí ki jɔ́ḿ ki kpántí circir diiku ti-Dindaan pu.

eng: Christ is building you into a place where God lives through the Spirit.
local: Ni nì Yeesu Kriisitoo nín ŋá ubaantee puee, nimbi nì timbi di kpáfì ki ŋá kii kudii kun ni Unimbɔti kóò kí dūú dī u-Fam puee.

eng: At one time you were like those persons. All of you used to do whatever felt good and whatever you thought you wanted so that you were children headed for punishment just like everyone else.
local: Ti-kɔkɔ mun nìn pée bí míǹ ní dooooyee, ki nóó timbi ti-ba nín là puee ní ki ŋáań min ní ti-pɔbiliŋ nì ti-landɔkɔi fáatèe. Ti nín nìn bí miŋyee, Unimbɔti tafadaaldi nìn dɔ̄ ki cí-ti kii an nín dɔ̄ ki cí bin béeyee puee ní.

eng: However, God is rich in mercy. He brought us to life with Christ while we were dead as a result of those things that we did wrong. He did this because of the great love that he has for us. You are saved by Gods grace!.
local: Ama, Unimbɔti sūǹ binib saai tikpil. U-neeŋkpaandi din u cáá ti-puee yāntì.

eng: However, God is rich in mercy. He brought us to life with Christ while we were dead as a result of those things that we did wrong. He did this because of the great love that he has for us. You are saved by Gods grace!.
local: nì min kɔkɔ ti nìn bí ŋkúmin ti-kpitii puee, u fātìi tīī-ti dimaŋfal ti nín kpáfì nì Yeesu Kriisitooyee. An sá u-ŋanti pu ní ni ká difiil.

eng: And God raised us up and seated us in the heavens with Christ Jesus.
local: Ti nì Kriisitoo nín ŋá ubaantee pu ní Unimbɔti fīkitì ti nì u, ki yāntì ti nì u kā yilpu.

eng: God did this to show future generations the greatness of his grace by the goodness that God has shown us in Christ Jesus.
local: U dī Yeesu Kriisitoo pu ní ki ŋá-ti tiŋan gbanti, kí dàkà bin làá dāá dāan̄ boonee u-ŋanti nín wīikí ki jítiǹ tikɔkɔ puee.

eng: You are saved by Gods grace because of your faith. This salvation is Gods gift. Its not something you possessed.
local: Di sá yii Unimbɔti ŋanti pu nì ni nín fōō Kriisitoo ki kííyee pu ní ni ká difiil. Difiil gbantee, naa ŋá tiba ní ki ká-dì, u pú-ni-dì faalaa ní.

eng: Its not something you did that you can be proud of.
local: An kaa tí sá ditundi pu, ní ubɔ ń nīn cáa gà u-bindi.

eng: This is why I, Paul, am a prisoner of Christ for you Gentiles.
local: An puee, man Pɔɔl bí ki mèé Unimbɔti. M sá Yeesu Kriisitoo sarkadaaŋwu ki tūǹ ditundi ki tìì nimbi bin kaa sá Juuda yabee.

eng: Gods purpose is now to show the rulers and powers in the heavens the many different varieties of his wisdom through the church.
local: Ama kɔŋkɔnnee Unimbɔti yāntì Kriisitoo nikitil puee, ituun nì bin kɔkɔ sá bipɔndambi ki bí yilpuee béè Unimbɔti ciiŋyi nín wīikí ki bí tɔbin puee.

eng: This was consistent with the plan he had from the beginning of time that he accomplished through Christ Jesus our Lord.
local: Míǹ ní u dī ti-Dindaan Yeesu Kriisitoo pu ki ŋá kii dooooyee u nín kaa nìn dáá náań duulinya ki lēē yii u làá dāá ŋá miŋyee.

eng: In Christ we have bold and confident access to God through faith in him.
local: Ti nín fōō Yeesu Kriisitoo ki kíí ti nì u ŋá ubaantee puee, ti ŋūǹ kí sútí kí pìl̄ Unimbɔti sɔkɔmii nì dimákal poon.

eng: So then, I ask you not to become discouraged by what Im suffering for you, which is your glory.
local: Míǹ puee, m mèé-ni yii m nín bíi jīǹ falaa ni-puee, ni-wunti ń taa yɔ̀tī. M-falaauee sá-ni tinyool ní.

eng: This is why I kneel before the Father.
local: An pu ní m gbàantí ti-Baa Unimbɔti nimbiin ki mèé ni-pu.

eng: Every ethnic group in heaven or on earth is recognized by him.
local: Úǹ cee ní bin bí yilpuee nì bin bí taapuee kíǹ ki nyí kubaatiiu.

eng: I ask that he will strengthen you in your inner selves from the riches of his glory through the Spirit.
local: Úǹ di sá tinyooldaan ki cáá tikɔkɔ, an puee ní m mèé-u án nín làá ŋá pu u-Fam ń tīī-ni mpɔn tikpil ni-pɔbiliŋinee.

eng: I ask that Christ will live in your hearts through faith. As a result of having strong roots in love.
local: M gíti mèé-u yii Kriisitoo ń nīn bí ni-pɔbiliŋin, kun puee ni fōō ki kíí. M mèé-u yii ú yàntī ní nīn néeń tɔb kí báań inyaan, kí nīn yú ki pɔ̄ɔ̄.

eng: I ask that youll have the power to grasp loves width and length, height and depth, together with all believers.
local: ní ni nì Unimbɔti yab kɔkɔ ń ŋmā kí ká mpɔn kí gbìl̄ Kriisitoo neendi nín lālim̀ ki gbí ilaan kɔkɔ puee.

eng: I ask that youll know the love of Christ that is beyond knowledge so that you will be filled entirely with the fullness of God.
local: Nì min kɔkɔ u-neendi wīikí tikpil ki jítiǹ unil nín ŋūǹ kí gbìl̄ miŋyee, m mèé-u yii ú yàntī ní béé, án nín làá ŋá pu tin kɔkɔ bí Unimbɔtinee ń nīn bí ni mun nee.

eng: Youve heard, of course, about the responsibility to distribute Gods grace, which God gave to me for you, right?.
local: Ni nyí yii Unimbɔti ŋá-mi tiŋan ki tīī-mi ditundi ḿ tɔ̄ kí tīī-ni.

eng: Glory to God, who is able to do far beyond all that we could ask or imagine by his power at work within us.
local: Úǹ Unimbɔti di ŋūǹ nì u-pɔŋŋu ŋun bí ti-ni ki tūǹ ditundee, kí ŋá tikɔkɔ án jītíǹ min ti mèé-uee nì min ti dàkafēe pu.

eng: glory to him in the church and in Christ Jesus for all generations, forever and always. Amen.
local: Yeesu Kriisitoo puee, Kriisitoo Nikitil ń tīī Unimbɔti tinyool ŋyunti kamaa kí nīn pée cáa cá jaanjaan! Ameeni.

eng: God showed me his secret plan in a revelation, as I mentioned briefly before .
local: Unimbɔti bīitì tibɔbalkaal tin nìn bí dooooyee pu, ki dàkā-mi ní m béè. Tíǹ ní m ŋmàn̄-ni nì anyɔɔbuŋkaaŋkaa nee.

eng: when you read this, youll understand my insight into the secret plan about Christ.
local: Ni yaa bíi kàaǹ tin m ŋmàn̄ nee, ni làá ká yii m béè Kriisitoo bɔti tin nìn bí dibalinee.

eng: Earlier generations didnt know this hidden plan that God has now revealed to his holy apostles and prophets through the Spirit.
local: Dooooyee, Unimbɔti kaa nìn nyántì an bɔtee ki dàkā binib. Kɔŋkɔnnee u dī u-Fam pu ki yāntì u-circir kpambaliŋ nì u-bɔnaatiliibi béè-tì.

eng: This plan is that the Gentiles would be coheirs and parts of the same body, and that they would share with the Jews in the promises of God in Christ Jesus through the gospel.
local: Tíǹ di sá tigaajati tin Unimbɔti tìì Juuda yabee. Ni mun làá fōō-tì, ni nì Juuda yab kɔkɔ kpántì unibaanti ní. Unimbɔti nín pōoǹ tin kí tīī bin sá Yeesu Kriisitoo yabee, u làá tīī ni mun kudɔŋu, Tibɔmɔntiil tin ni fōō ki kííyee pu.

eng: I became a servant of the gospel because of the grace that God showed me through the exercise of his power.
local: Unimbɔti ŋá-mi tiŋan ki tīī-mi ditundi din sá ḿ nīn sòoǹ Tibɔmɔntiil ki tìì binibee. Nì u-pɔŋŋu ní u ŋá míǹ.

eng: God gave his grace to me, the least of all Gods people, to preach the good news about the immeasurable riches of Christ to the Gentiles.
local: Unimbɔti yab kɔkɔ kansikinee, man di sá bin sá ŋwaamuee waaki. Nì míǹ kɔkɔee, Unimbɔti pú-mi diyimɔɔl ḿ sòoǹ nì bin kaa sá Juuda yabee Kriisitoo gaajati tin sá tikpaŋkpaandi, kaa cáá dikúntilee bɔti.

eng: God sent me to reveal the secret plan that had been hidden since the beginning of time by God, who created everything.
local: U pú-mi diyimɔɔl ḿ dàkà binib ń béé tin Unimbɔti nìn lēē kí ŋá an nìn dáá bál̀ u-ni dooooyee. Unimbɔti un náań tikɔkɔee di dū-tì ki bál̀ áli ki dāa sāā ŋyunti ŋun bí nee.

eng: Therefore, as a prisoner for the Lord, I encourage you to live as people worthy of the call you received from God.
local: An puee, man Pɔɔl un bí sarkan m nín nóó ti-Dindaanee puee, m mèé-ni yii ní nīn bí mbimbim min poon Unimbɔti yíiń-ni ní nīn bée.

eng: The one who went down is the same one who climbed up above all the heavens so that he might fill everything.
local: Yeesu Kriisitoo un sīntìń taapu dooyee, úǹ ubaantee di tí jɔ́m̀ yilpu fɔ́ŋŋŋ kí gbí duulinya kɔkɔn.

eng: He gave some apostles, some prophets, some evangelists, and some pastors and teachers.
local: Úǹ di yākatì atuun ki tīī u-nib, biba ń nīn sá u-kpambaliŋ, biba ń nīn sá Unimbɔti bɔnaatiliibi, biba ń nīn yìiǹ ki sòoǹ Yeesu Bɔmɔntiiti, biba ń nīn sá u-nikitiŋ kpootiliibi ní biba mun ń nīn sá Unimbɔti bɔti dàkaliibi.

eng: His purpose was to equip Gods people for the work of serving and building up the body of Christ.
local: U yākatì atuun míǹ ki tīī Unimbɔti nib ń ŋmā kí tɔ̄ Unimbɔti tundi mmɔntiim án nín làá ŋá pu Kriisitoo wuntee ń nīn cá nyɔkɔpuee ní.

eng: until we all reach the unity of faith and knowledge of Gods Son. Gods goal is for us to become mature adults—to be fully grown, measured by the standard of the fullness of Christ.
local: Míǹ di làá yàntī ti-kɔkɔ ń kpántí ubaanti ti nín fōō Unimbɔti Jipɔɔn Yeesu Kriisitoo ki kííyee pu, ní kí béé-u mbaamɔm. Mimmee, ti cíkití Unimbɔti bɔtin ní kí kpántí biniŋmambi, kii Kriisitoo u-ba nín bí puee.

eng: As a result, we arent supposed to be infants any longer who can be tossed and blown around by every wind that comes from teaching with deceitful scheming and the tricks people play to deliberately mislead others.
local: Ŋyunti gbantee, taa ti sá kii campɔntibee biŋmatinliibi cáá bi-bɔti ki ŋmàtíǹ-ti kii nnyim nì kubuŋu nín téekí buŋalimbu pu bu yìiǹ ajan kɔkɔ puee.

eng: Instead, by speaking the truth with love, lets grow in every way into Christ.
local: Ama ti máaǹ kí nīn cáá dineendi ki sòoǹ Yeesu bɔti nì ibaamɔn, kí nīn wīintí kí tin ŋmàntīǹ Kriisitoo un sá u-nikitil yilee.

eng: who is the head. The whole body grows from him, as it is joined and held together by all the supporting ligaments. The body makes itself grow in that it builds itself up with love as each one does its part.
local: Úǹ di kpáfì u-nikitil din sá u-wuntee, bi ŋá ubaanti, kii unil wunti jaŋŋi nín kpáfì ki nɔ̀b̄ tɔb pu puee. Ajan kɔkɔ yaa tūǹ ŋi-tundi nín sá puee, tiwun wīintí ní tiŋan. Míǹ ní dineendi yaa bí Kriisitoo nikitil kansikinee, dì cá nyɔkɔpu ní tiŋan.

eng: So Im telling you this, and I insist on it in the Lord: you shouldnt live your life like the Gentiles anymore. They base their lives on pointless thinking.
local: Tibɔti tin m làá sòoǹ nì ni nee, ti-Dindaan nyɔkɔpu ní m làá sòoǹ-tì. Ni-bimbim ń taa nín̄ bí kii bin kaa nyí Unimbɔtee nín bí puee. Bíǹ nóó bi-landɔkɔkulimii ní.

eng: and they are in the dark in their reasoning. They are disconnected from Gods life because of their ignorance and their closed hearts.
local: Bi-pɔbiliŋ nín gbìfì baa nyí nnimbɔtisanee pu ní bi dáá bí dibɔmbɔndin ki lántì dimaŋfal din Unimbɔti tīīyee.

eng: They are people who lack all sense of right and wrong, and who have turned themselves over to doing whatever feels good and to practicing every sort of corruption along with greed.
local: Baa nyí icoo, ki dū bi-ba ki tīī atuŋkpiti ní ki ŋáań tijɔkɔndi kɔkɔ nì ti-bulifi ki cá, kaa gbèentí.

eng: Conduct yourselves with all humility, gentleness, and patience. Accept each other with love.
local: Ní nīn sìntīǹ ni-ba taapu kí nīn mɔ̄, kí nīn cáá kimɔtii tɔb pu, kí nīn ŋúb́maan tɔb nì dineendi poon.

eng: But you didnt learn that sort of thing from Christ.
local: Nimbee, kaa sá míǹ ní bi dàkā-ni ní béé Kriisitoo.

eng: Since you really listened to him and you were taught how the truth is in Jesus.
local: Ni lafun gbìl̄ tikɔkɔ u-pu, ní bi dàkā-ni ni béè ibaamɔn in bí Yeesunee.

eng: change the former way of life that was part of the person you once were, corrupted by deceitful desires.
local: An puee, fámaan ni-bimbim min kaa ŋān̄ee, min cāabìń-ni nnimbitaataam ki bíiĺ-nee.

eng: Instead, renew the thinking in your mind by the Spirit.
local: Ní yàntī Unimbɔti ń kpántí ni-pɔbiliŋ nì ni-landɔkɔi mpɔm.

eng: and clothe yourself with the new person created according to Gods image in justice and true holiness.
local: Ní nīn nóómaan mbimbipɔm min Unimbɔti náań ki nántiǹ u-yam min sá deedee nì circir ki nyánní ibaamɔnnee.

eng: Therefore, after you have gotten rid of lying, Each of you must tell the truth to your neighbor because we are parts of each other in the same body.
local: An puee, ní fá inyimɔn. Báà ŋma ń sòoǹ u-juti ibaamɔn, kun puee ti-kɔkɔ kpáfì ki ŋá tiwumbaantiil ní.

eng: Be angry without sinning. Dont let the sun set on your anger.
local: Ni yaa fōō diŋuulee, ní nīn nyí nì ni-ba kí taa kɔ́ ikpitin, kí taa nín̄ díkí diŋuul míǹ áli kunyeeu ń tin mɔ́.

eng: Dont provide an opportunity for the devil.
local: Ní taa pɔ̄maan Sitaan nsan.

eng: Thieves should no longer steal. Instead, they should go to work, using their hands to do good so that they will have something to share with whoever is in need.
local: Un nìn sá unaayuuyee ń taa ti yɔ̀. Ú pɔ́ɔǹ u-ba kí tɔ̄ ditundi min máaǹee kí kpíiǹ u-ba kí ká kí tūtuǹ uwɔfi.

eng: Dont let any foul words come out of your mouth. Only say what is helpful when it is needed for building up the community so that it benefits those who hear what you say.
local: Tibɔkpitil ń taa nín̄ nyēē ni-nyɔmmun, ama ni yaa làá sòoǹee, nín̄ sòom̀maan tin làá tūtuǹ bin fōō Yeesu ki kííyee ń cù nyɔkɔpu, kí kèetī bin bí ki pílifée mun.

eng: and make an effort to preserve the unity of the Spirit with the peace that ties you together.
local: Ní pɔ́ɔǹ ni-ba kí nīn ŋúb́ nnyɔɔpee ŋun Unimbɔti Fam tìì-nee, ŋgbansɔŋfi ń nīn bí ni-kansikin ní ŋá ubaanti.

eng: Dont make the Holy Spirit of God unhappy—you were sealed by him for the day of redemption.
local: Ní taa kɔ́ǹ Unimbɔti Fam kunimbaau, u-Famee ní u dūu dáań-ni ki síiǹ yii ŋwiin ŋubɔ dòoń u làá dāá fīī-ni kí líí kɔkɔ.

eng: Put aside all bitterness, losing your temper, anger, shouting, and slander, along with every other evil.
local: Ní nyāntímaan ni-kansikin ntuntun nì kináŋ nì diŋuul tɔb pu, nì kujaau, nì tɔb boon disambiil, kí kúntímaan ntoom nì mi-yalii kɔkɔ.

eng: Be kind, compassionate, and forgiving to each other, in the same way God forgave you in Christ.
local: Ama nín̄ sámaan binimɔntiibi, kí nīn sūǹ tɔb saai, kí nīn pūǹ tɔb kpitii, kii Kriisitoo puee, Unimbɔti nín dū ni mun kpitii ki pú-ni puee.

eng: You are one body and one spirit, just as God also called you in one hope.
local: Yeesu wunti sá tibaantiil ní, ní Unimbɔti Fam mun sá mbaantiim. Míǹ ní ti-kɔkɔ máká kuwambaantiiu kun pu Unimbɔti yíiń-nee.

eng: There is one Lord, one faith, one baptism.
local: Ti-kɔkɔ Dindaan sá ubaanti, ní ti-fookiiu sá ubaanti, ní Unimbɔti nyim fàltam sá mbaantiim.

eng: and one God and Father of all, who is over all, through all, and in all.
local: Unimbɔti sá ubaanti, ki sá tikɔkɔ Baa, ki tɔ́kɔ́ tikɔkɔ pu, ki dì tikɔkɔ pu ki tūǹ u-tundi ní ki bí tikɔkɔn.

eng: God has given his grace to each one of us measured out by the gift that is given by Christ.
local: Un sá kamaa fōō dipɔl kii Kriisitoo nín tīī-u puee.

eng: Thats why scripture says, When he climbed up to the heights, he captured prisoners, and he gave gifts to people .
local: Kii an nín ŋmàn̄ Unimbɔti gbɔŋku poon puee yii: «U nín jɔ́ḿ yilpuee, u kpáaǹ iyumbu ní ki pú binib apɔl.».

eng: What does the phrase he climbed up mean if it doesnt mean that he had first gone down into the lower regions, the earth?.
local: Mimmee, dinyɔɔbundi din lī yii: «U jɔ́m̀ yilpuee» là kí lì yii ba dee? An taapu di sá yii u nìn dáá sīntìń taapu doo nee ní.

eng: Therefore, imitate God like dearly loved children.
local: Ni nín sá Unimbɔti biyaamu mun u néeńee puee, nín̄ bímaan kii úǹ nín bí puee.

eng: Therefore, test everything to see whats pleasing to the Lord.
local: Pɔ́ɔm̀maan ni-ba kí béé min fáatì ti-Dindaanee.

eng: and dont participate in the unfruitful actions of darkness. Instead, you should reveal the truth about them.
local: Ní taa dū ni-ba kí cèeǹ bin sá dibɔmbɔndi yab ki tūǹ atuun ŋin kaa cáá ipaatee poon, ama ní nyāntí bi-tuŋkpitiŋ mpaampiin pu.

eng: Its embarrassing to even talk about what certain persons do in secret.
local: An cáá icoo gba tí sòoǹ bi nín ŋáań tin dibalinee.

eng: But everything exposed to the light is revealed by the light.
local: Bi yaa nyántì tin bi ŋáańee mpaampiin puee, ní ni béetí tin ní an baasii sée.

eng: Everything that is revealed by the light is light. Therefore, it says, Wake up, sleeper! Get up from the dead, and Christ will shine on you. .
local: Kun puee tin kɔkɔ nyáń ŋwalifinee ní bi wāĺ, an pu ní an lī yii: «Sii un gèeǹee, fìntī, fìntī bitaŋkpiibi kansikin Kriisitoo ń ŋmíntí-si.».

eng: So be careful to live your life wisely, not foolishly.
local: An puee, ní nīn nyí nì ni-ba kí taa fōō bin kaa nyí tibee bimbim, ama ní nīn sá binib bin cáá iciinee.

eng: Take advantage of every opportunity because these are evil times.
local: Ní taa nín̄ bíiĺ iyunti kun puee, iyunti in poon ti bí nee, ikpiti wíiǹ tikpil.

eng: Because of this, dont be ignorant, but understand the Lords will.
local: Ní taa nín̄ sá bigbaambi, ama béémaan ti-Dindaan nín là ní nīn ŋáań miŋyee.

eng: Dont get drunk on wine, which produces depravity. Instead, be filled with the Spirit in the following ways.
local: Ní taa nín̄ nyù idafi ki gbéè, kun puee an di bíiĺ unil, ama ní nīn gbéèmaan Unimbɔti Fam.

eng: speak to each other with psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs; sing and make music to the Lord in your hearts.
local: Ní nīn gà ni-kansikin ilan in bí Inyɔŋki laŋyi gbɔŋkunee nì Kriisitoo nikitil laŋyi, nì ilan in Unimbɔti Fam tìì-nee, kí nīn cáámaan an laŋyi ki gà ki tìì ti-Dindaan, kí nīn nyɔ́ŋkí-u nì ni-pɔbiliŋ kɔkɔ.

eng: Live your life with love, following the example of Christ, who loved us and gave himself for us. He was a sacrificial offering that smelled sweet to God.
local: Ní nīn ŋáaḿmaan tikɔkɔ nì dineendi poon, kii Kriisitoo nín néeń-ti pu, ki dū u-ba ki ŋá saraa ki tīī Unimbɔti ti-pu u-saraauee fáatì Unimbɔtee.

eng: always give thanks to God the Father for everything in the name of our Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Nín̄ jáaḿmaan ti-Baa Unimbɔti ti-Dindaan Yeesu Kriisitoo yindi pu ŋyunti kamaa nì tikɔkɔ pu.

eng: and submit to each other out of respect for Christ.
local: Nimbi bin tɔ́ Kriisitooyee, sìntīmaan ni-ba taapu kí tīī man tɔb.

eng: For example, wives should submit to their husbands as if to the Lord.
local: Nimbi binimpoobee, sìntīmaan ni-ba taapu kí tīī ni-calib kii ni nín fàŋkí ti-Dindaan puee.

eng: A husband is the head of his wife like Christ is head of the church, that is, the savior of the body.
local: Kun puee uninja di sá unimpu yidaaŋwu, kii Kriisitoo nín sá uyidaan ki sá Ufiil ki tīī u-nikitil din sá u-wuntee puee.

eng: So wives submit to their husbands in everything like the church submits to Christ.
local: Míǹ puee, binimpoobi máaǹ kí sìntīǹ bi-ba taapu tikɔkɔ poon kí tīī bi-calib, kii Kriisitoo nikitil nín sīntiǹ di-ba ki tīī-u puee.

eng: As for husbands, love your wives just like Christ loved the church and gave himself for her.
local: Nimbi bininjabee, nín̄ néeḿmaan ni-nimpoobi, kii Kriisitoo nín néeń u-nikitil pu ki kpíì di-puee.

eng: He did this to make her holy by washing her in a bath of water with the word.
local: U ŋá míǹ u-nikitil ń nīn bí circir ní, di sá u fùl̄-bi nnyim ní ki dū u-nyɔɔbundi ki ŋáŋkì-bi.

eng: He did this to present himself with a splendid church, one without any sort of stain or wrinkle on her clothes, but rather one that is holy and blameless.
local: Di sá yii u gāntì-bi bí dāan̄ Unimbɔti nimbiin nì kunyaaŋŋu, kí nīn jɔ̀m̀ pɔ́lpɔl kí nīn bí circir, bí taa ká bi-pu tiba.

eng: Thats how husbands ought to love their wives—in the same way as they do their own bodies. Anyone who loves his wife loves himself.
local: Míǹ mbaantiim ní bininjab mun máaǹ kí nīn néeń bi-nimpoobi kii bi nín néeń bíǹ bi-ba wunti puee. Un yaa néeń u-nimpuuee néeń u-ba dee.

eng: No one ever hates his own body, but feeds it and takes care of it just like Christ does for the church.
local: Kun puee ubɔ kaa bí ki ná u-ba wunti, ama u kpīintí-tì, ní ki kpèé-tì tiŋan, kii Kriisitoo nín kpèé u-nikitil puee.

eng: Sexual immorality, and any kind of impurity or greed, shouldnt even be mentioned among you, which is right for holy persons.
local: Kɔŋkɔnnee ni sá Unimbɔti yab ní, an puee, an yaa sá tilaakpaal nì tin kɔkɔ pée sá dijɔkɔntundi nì nnimbitaataamee, bí taa gbìl̄ an bɔti pu gba ni-kansikin.

eng: because we are parts of his body.
local: Di sá yii ti-kɔkɔ túkú u-wunti pu ní.

eng: This is why a man will leave his father and mother and be united with his wife, and the two of them will be one body .
local: kii an nín ŋmàn̄ Unimbɔti gbɔŋku poon puee yii: «An pu ní uninja dāa nyēē u-baa nì u-na cee, ní u nì u-nimpuu ń nīn kíǹ ki bí, ní bi-liitilee ń kpántí unibaanti.».

eng: Marriage is a significant allegory, and Im applying it to Christ and the church.
local: An sá tibɔkpaandi ní dijandi nee dàkà-ti. M làá tùkù-ni yii an sòoǹ Kriisitoo nì u-nikitil pu ní.

eng: In any case, as for you individually, each one of you should love his wife as himself, and wives should respect their husbands.
local: Ama tin kíǹee di sá yii nimbee, báà ŋma ń nīn néeń u-nimpuu kii úǹ u-bee, ní unimpu mun ń nīn tɔ́ u-cal.

eng: Obscene language, silly talk, or vulgar jokes arent acceptable for believers. Instead, there should be thanksgiving.
local: An kaa ŋān̄ ní nīn sòoǹ anyɔɔbuŋkpil nì tibɔfan nì icoo bɔti, ama an ŋān̄ yii ní nīn pàkà Unimbɔti ní.

eng: Because you know for sure that persons who are sexually immoral, impure, or greedy—which happens when things become gods—those persons wont inherit the kingdom of Christ and God.
local: Ní nīn nyí yii bin ŋáań tilaakpaal nì tin pée sá dijɔkɔntundee, nì bin cáá nnimbitaataamee: kun puee nnimbitaataam sá kii iwaatootee ní. An nibee kɔkɔ kaa làá dāá kɔ́ Kriisitoo nì Unimbɔti Beelin.

eng: Nobody should deceive you with stupid ideas. Gods anger comes down on those who are disobedient because of this kind of thing.
local: Ní taa yàntī báà ubɔ ń dū tibɔfan kí ŋmàtiǹ-ni. An tuŋkpitiŋ pu ní Unimbɔti làá dāá fōō diŋuul bin kaa tɔ́-uee pu.

eng: So you shouldnt have anything to do with them.
local: An puee, ní taa cèeǹ bi-ni.

eng: You were once darkness, but now you are light in the Lord, so live your life as children of light.
local: Dooooyee, ni nìn dáá bí dibɔmbɔndin ní, ama kɔŋkɔnnee ni kɔ́ ŋwalifin, kun puee ni kpántì ti-Dindaan yab. Míǹ puee ni-bimbim ń nīn bí kii bin bí ŋwalifinee bimbim nín bí puee.

eng: Light produces fruit that consists of every sort of goodness, justice, and truth.
local: Kun puee ŋwalifi nín tìì tiŋyee di sá tiŋan kamaa nì deedee nì ibaamɔn.

eng: As for children, obey your parents in the Lord, because it is right.
local: Mbiyaamu, ni nín sá ti-Dindaan yabee puee, ní nīn tɔ́ ni-baabi nì ni-nab, kun puee míǹ di ŋān̄.

eng: Finally, be strengthened by the Lord and his powerful strength.
local: Tibɔjoolkaal tin m làá dūú kàan̄-nee sèé: ní fōōmaan ti-Dindaan pɔŋkpaaŋŋu kí pɔ̄ɔkì.

eng: Put on Gods armor so that you can make a stand against the tricks of the devil.
local: Ní dū tijanjawan tin kɔkɔ Unimbɔti tììyee kí pèen̄ kí ŋmā kí sīĺ deedee ŋyunti ŋun Sitaan yaa yíkìń ni-pu nì u-kīiltamee.

eng: We arent fighting against human enemies but against rulers, authorities, forces of cosmic darkness, and spiritual powers of evil in the heavens.
local: Kun puee an kaa sá ti làá jáǹ binib ní, an sá ti nì arasiniibi nì bi-bɔtiibi, nì bin kɔkɔ jīǹ abee dibɔmbɔndin, duulinyan dooyee, nì arasiniibi bin bí kutaa puee ní ti làá jáǹ.

eng: Therefore, pick up the full armor of God so that you can stand your ground on the evil day and after you have done everything possible to still stand.
local: An puee, fōōmaan tijanjawan tin kɔkɔ Unimbɔti tììyee, án nín làá ŋá pu ní an yaa láa píĺ ki pɔ́ɔkèe, ní ŋmā kí yūĺ kí já kí pɔ̄ɔkèe. Ni yaa jáń ki pɔ́ɔkèe, ní ní báań kí yūĺ.

eng: So stand with the belt of truth around your waist, justice as your breastplate.
local: An puee ní bɔ́ntí ni-ba kí dū ibaamɔn in sá-ni dambalee kí gbìn̄ ni-cammu, ni-deedeeu ń nīn sá-ni dijanjabɔkutil ní dūú pèen̄.

eng: and put shoes on your feet so that you are ready to spread the good news of peace.
local: Difaŋgiil din ni cáá ki sòoǹ Tibɔmɔntiil tin tìì binib ŋgbansɔŋfee ń nīn sá-ni anaataka ní táká.

eng: Above all, carry the shield of faith so that you can extinguish the flaming arrows of the evil one.
local: Ni-fookiiu un ni cáá Unimbɔti puee ń nīn sá-ni digbampɔɔl ní dūú gbíntí Sitaan ukpiti piiŋyi in u tòoń i sá ŋŋmee.

eng: Take the helmet of salvation and the sword of the Spirit, which is Gods word.
local: Ní fōō difiil dí nīn sá-ni kijanjafuulii ní cíkiń, kí yòom̄maan kitàataajiki kin Unimbɔti Fam tììyee mun, an dàkà yii Unimbɔti nyɔɔbundi.

eng: Offer prayers and petitions in the Spirit all the time. Stay alert by hanging in there and praying for all believers.
local: Ní nīn mèémaan kí taa gbèen̄. Ní yàntī Circir Fam ń kpòotī-ni ni-wimmeem nì tin kɔkɔ ni bàlifēe poon. Ní fìntīmaan an bɔti pu, kí nīn mèémaan múlmul ki tìì Kriisitoo yab kɔkɔ.

eng: As for me, pray that when I open my mouth, Ill get a message that confidently makes this secret plan of the gospel known.
local: Mèèmaan Unimbɔti ma mun pu, ú tīī-mi tibɔti tin máaǹ ḿ sòoǹee, ḿ ŋmā kí sòoǹ Tibɔmɔntiil tin nìn bí dibalinee nì tininjati.

eng: The commandment Honor your father and mother is the first one with a promise attached.
local: Unimbɔti marau lī yii: «Á nīn tɔ́ a-baa nì a-na.» Úǹ di sá marapeepeekaa un pu Unimbɔti kútì dipoondee.

eng: Im an ambassador in chains for the sake of the gospel. Pray so that the Lord will give me the confidence to say what I have to say.
local: Nì min kɔkɔ m bí sarka poonee, man di sá un Yeesu Kriisitoo túnní, ḿ nīn sòoǹ Tibɔmɔntiil gbantee. An puee ní mèè Unimbɔti, án nín làá ŋá pu ḿ sòoǹ-tì ti-pú nì tininjatee.

eng: Tychicus, my loved brother and faithful servant of the Lord, can inform you about my situation and what Im doing.
local: Ti-nabineeŋkaaki Tiisiiki, un tūǹ ti-Dindaan tundi nì ibaamɔnee, làá māafì-ni min ní m bí dooyee, ní ŋmā kí béé tin kɔkɔ m bí doo ki ŋáańee.

eng: Ive sent him for this reason—so that you will know about us. He can reassure you.
local: Kun pu m dū-u ki túnní ni-ceeyee di sá ní ŋmā kí béé tin poon ti bée, ú kpáàa tīī-ni kunyannyaau.

eng: May there be peace with the brothers and sisters as well as love with the faith that comes from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Ti-Baa Unimbɔti nì ti-Dindaan Yeesu Kriisitoo ń tīī nnabiyaamu kɔkɔ ŋgbansɔŋfi, kí yàntī bí nīn néeń tɔb, kí nīn gbíntìi cáá fookii Unimbɔti pu.

eng: May grace be with all those who love our Lord Jesus Christ forever.
local: Unimbɔti ŋanti ń nīn bí bin kɔkɔ cáá ti-Dindaan Yeesu Kriisitoo pu dineendi kaa gbèentée pu.

eng: so that things will go well for you, and you will live for a long time in the land .
local: yii: «Sii un yaa tɔ́ a-baa nì a-nee, a làá ká dipɔɔsɔŋkil ki làá kàl̄ kitiŋ pu kí yúntí.».

eng: As for parents, dont provoke your children to anger, but raise them with discipline and instruction about the Lord.
local: Nimbi bibaatiibee, ní taa nín̄ kɔ̄ntí ni-biyaamu aŋuu, ama nín̄ ŋúb́maan-mu, kí nīn dàkà-mu, ki sáŋkí-mu kii ti-Dindaan nín dàkà miŋyee.

eng: As for slaves, obey your human masters with fear and trembling and with sincere devotion to Christ.
local: Nimbi iyumbuee, nín̄ tɔ́maan ni-dindambi nì ni-pɔbiliŋ kɔkɔ kí nīn fàŋkí-bi. Ni yaa ŋáań mimmee, ni tɔ́ Kriisitoo dee.

eng: Dont work to make yourself look good and try to flatter people, but act like slaves of Christ carrying out Gods will from the heart.
local: An kaa sá bi yaa bée ŋmaniŋma ní ní nīn tūǹ atuun, bí wāl̀ kí pàkà-ni. Ama ni nín sá Kriisitoo yumbuyee puee, ní nīn ŋáań min fáatì Unimbɔtee nì dipɔbil diba.

eng: Serve your owners enthusiastically, as though you were serving the Lord and not human beings.
local: Ní tɔ̄maan ditundi míǹ mbaantiim kí tīī ni-dindambi kii ti-Dindaan u-ba ní ni tūǹ ki tììyee, an taa nín̄ sá kii binib ní ni tūǹ ki tììyee.

eng: You know that the Lord will reward every person who does what is right, whether that person is a slave or a free person.
local: Ní nīn nyí yii uyumbuɔɔɔ, un yì u-beeyaaa, ti-Dindaan làá dāá pà báà ŋma tummɔntiŋ ŋin u ŋée paati ní.

eng: As for masters, treat your slaves in the same way. Stop threatening them, because you know that both you and your slaves have a master in heaven. He doesnt distinguish between people on the basis of status.
local: Nimbi iyumbu dindambee, ni mun ń nīn ŋáaḿmaan ni-yumbui tiŋan mbaantiim kí taa nín̄ yòontí i-pɔbiliŋ. Ní nīn nyí yii nimbi nì ni-yumbuuyee, ni-kɔkɔ kpiliu sá ubaanti ní ki bí yilpu, úǹ kaa gàntī binib.

eng: From Paul, an apostle who is not sent from human authority or commissioned through human agency, but sent through Jesus Christ and God the Father who raised him from the dead.
local: Ti-Baa Unimbɔti nì Yeesu Kriisitoo un u nìn fīkitì ditaŋkpiilinee di lēē man Pɔɔl ḿ nīn sá dikpambal, kaa sá binib di lēē-mi, kaa tí sá unil di yì-tì ní m sá dikpambal.

eng: Am I trying to win over human beings or God? Or am I trying to please people? If I were still trying to please people, I wouldnt be Christs slave.
local: Tin m sòoǹ nee, m là binib ń pàkà-mi níii? Unimbɔti pampakaku ní m nyàab̀. M nyàab̀ kí fáatíǹ binib níii? M yaan nyàab̀ kí fáatíǹ binibee, maa bàà sámaan Kriisitoo tɔntɔnliu.

eng: Brothers and sisters, I want you to know that the gospel I preached isnt human in origin.
local: Nnabiyaamu, m là ní béé yii Tibɔmɔntiil tin m sòon̄ nì nee, an kaa sá unil di náań-tì.

eng: I didnt receive it or learn it from a human. It came through a revelation from Jesus Christ.
local: kaa sá m ká-tì unil ubɔ cee, ubɔ mun kaa tí dàkā-mi-tì. An sá Yeesu Kriisitoo di nyántì-tì ki dàkā-mi.

eng: You heard about my previous life in Judaism, how severely I harassed Gods church and tried to destroy it.
local: Di sá yii ni gbìl̄ m nín nìn ŋáań min dooooyee. M nín nìn ŋúb́ Juuda yab marabee, m nìn sàantí Unimbɔti nikitil an gíti lákatì, ki nyàab̀ kí kúntí-dì.

eng: I advanced in Judaism beyond many of my peers, because I was much more militant about the traditions of my ancestors.
local: M nìn ŋúb́ Juuda yab marab ki jítiǹ m-jutiibi tikpil man nì bin ŋmèe, ní ki nìn néeń m-naanjab koobiliŋ ki jítiǹ-bi.

eng: But God had set me apart from birth and called me through his grace. He was pleased.
local: Ama Unimbɔti nìn pée gāntì-mi ki yóoǹ doooo m-na poon ní ki yíiń-mi u-ŋanti pu.

eng: to reveal his Son to me, so that I might preach about him to the Gentiles. I didnt immediately consult with any human being.
local: Ŋyunti ŋun u lēēyee ní u dū u-Jipɔɔn ki dàkā-mi m béè-u, án nín làá ŋá pu ḿ sòoǹ u-Jipɔɔnee pu kí tīī bin kaa sá Juuda yabee. Niinee, maa bālifì báà ubɔ isaŋki.

eng: I didnt go up to Jerusalem to see the men who were apostles before me either, but I went away into Arabia and I returned again to Damascus.
local: Maa tí búntì Jeerusaleem kí cùú nyàab̀ bin péeǹ-mi ki kpántì akpambalee. M pée búntì Bilaalibub tiŋkin dicilpu ní. Boonee ní m dāa fātìi gítìń Damaasi tiŋkin.

eng: Then after three years I went up to Jerusalem to visit Cephas and stayed with him fifteen days.
local: Abin ata boonee ní m nín jɔ́m̀ Jeerusaleem kí béé Peetroo, ní ki kāl̀ u-cee iwiin saalku.

eng: But I didnt see any other of the apostles except James the brother of the Lord.
local: Maa ti ká Yeesu kpambal diba ki kútì see Yakubu, ti-Dindaan naal.

eng: and from all the brothers and sisters with me. To the churches in Galatia.
local: Man nì nnabiyaamu mun kɔkɔ bí m-ceeyee di jáaḿ Kriisitoo nikitiŋ ŋin bí Galaati tiŋkinee.

eng: Before God, Im not lying about the things that Im writing to you!.
local: Tin tin m ŋmàn̄-nee, m ŋmàn̄-tì Unimbɔti nimbiin ní, maa mɔ́ntí.

eng: Then I went into the regions of Syria and Cilicia.
local: Boonee ní m búntì Siirii nì Siilisii timmun.

eng: but I wasnt known personally by the Christian churches in Judea.
local: Ŋyunti gbantee, Kriisitoo nikitiŋ ŋin bí Juudee tiŋkinee kaa láá béè-mi.

eng: They only heard a report about me: The man who used to harass us now preaches the faith that he once tried to destroy.
local: Bi pée gbìl̄ bi sòon̄ yii: «Unil un nìn sàantí-ti tikpilee ki kíǹ ki bíi sòoǹ kɔŋkɔnnee fookii Bɔmɔntiiti tin u nìn nyàab̀ kí kúntée.».

eng: So they were glorifying God because of me.
local: Ní bi kíǹ ki bíi pàkà Unimbɔti m-pu.

eng: Grace and peace to you from God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
local: Ti-Baa Unimbɔti nì ti-Dindaan Yeesu Kriisitoo ń ŋá-ni tiŋan kí tīī-ni ŋgbansɔŋfi.

eng: He gave himself for our sins, so he could deliver us from this present evil age, according to the will of our God and Father.
local: Yeesu di dū u-ba ki ŋá saraa ti-kpitii pu kí ŋmā kí nyāntí-ti ŋyuntikpiti ŋun poon ti bí nee. Míǹ ní Unimbɔti un sá ti-Baayee là.

eng: To God be the glory forever and always! Amen.
local: Úǹ di máaǹ tinyool kí nīn pée cá jaanjaan! Ameeni.

eng: Im amazed that you are so quickly deserting the one who called you by the grace of Christ to follow another gospel.
local: M bākatì tikpil yii ni pūtì kpáàa bíi féeń Unimbɔti un dī Kriisitoo ŋanti pu ki yíiń-nee, ki póotí tibɔpɔn tiba.

eng: Its not really another gospel, but certain people are confusing you and they want to change the gospel of Christ.
local: Ama Tibɔmɔntiil tiba kaa ti bí ki kútì Yeesu Bɔmɔntiiti pu. An sá binib biba di là kí lábití ni-landɔkɔi kí cúú Kriisitoo Bɔmɔntiiti kí kpántí.

eng: However, even if we ourselves or a heavenly angel should ever preach anything different from what we preached to you, they should be under a curse.
local: Un di yaa tí dɔ́mińee, - báà an yaa sá timbaaa, an yaa tí sá Unimbɔti tuuŋŋu di yaa nyánní yilpu - ki cáań-ni tibɔpɔn tin nyáń ti-ba nì Tibɔmɔntiil tin ti nìn péé péé ki sòon̄ nì nee, Unimbɔti ń ŋá udaan fám.

eng: Im repeating what weve said before: if anyone preaches something different from what you received, they should be under a curse!.
local: Ti pée tùkū-ni dooooyee, ní m gíti bíi bùsī-ni díǹ, yii ubɔ yaa sòon̄ nì ni tibɔti tin nyáń ti-ba nì tin tin ni nìn fōōyee, Unimbɔti ń ŋá udaan fám!.

eng: Then after fourteen years I went up to Jerusalem again with Barnabas, and I took Titus along also.
local: Dibindi diba kpá saalku boonee, ní m gítì Jeerusaleem. M nìn kpáaǹ Baarnaabaasi nì Tiiti.

eng: They asked only that we would remember the poor, which was certainly something I was willing to do.
local: Ama tin baba bi mēē-tee di sá yii tí taa súntí biwɔfib pu, tibɔti tin mun nìn pée bí m-pɔbilin m ŋáańee dee.

eng: But when Cephas came to Antioch, I opposed him to his face, because he was wrong.
local: Ama, ŋyunti ŋun Peetroo nìn dɔ́miń Antiyɔɔsee, m nìn wòon̄-u u-nimbiin, kun puee u nìn yīntì.

eng: He had been eating with the Gentiles before certain people came from James. But when they came, he began to back out and separate himself, because he was afraid of the people who promoted circumcision.
local: Di sá yii, kí wàatī ní binib biba ń nyānní Yakubu cee kí dāan̄ Antiyɔɔsee, u nì bin kaa sá Juuda yabee nìn kpáfí ki jīǹ tijin. Binib bin là báà ŋma ń gīfì dikpancandee bāańee, ní u fāŋkì-bi, ní ki kíǹ ki bāal̀, kaa ti là u nì bin kaa sá Juuda yabee ń kpāfì.

eng: And the rest of the Jews also joined him in this hypocrisy so that even Barnabas got carried away with them in their hypocrisy.
local: Ní Juuda yab bin kíǹee mun fōō u-biibiiu gbanti, áli gba ki téé Baarnaabaasi mun ki kɔ́ǹ biibii gbantin.

eng: But when I saw that they werent acting consistently with the truth of the gospel, I said to Cephas in front of everyone, If you, though youre a Jew, live like a Gentile and not like a Jew, how can you require the Gentiles to live like Jews.
local: M nín ká yii baa ti bíi còom̄ deedee kii Tibɔmɔntiil baamɔŋyi nín sá puee, ní m lī Peetroo báà ŋma nimbiin yii: «Sii un sá Juuda yɔuee yaa kaa nóó Juuda yab bimbim, ní ki yaa fōō bin kaa sá Juuda yabee bimbimee, ba ŋá ní a là kí páb́ bin kaa sá Juuda yabee bí fōō Juuda yab bimbim?».

eng: We are born Jews—were not Gentile sinners.
local: Bi màl̄ timbi ti sá Juuda yab, kaa sá biniyaŋyambi bikpitib.

eng: However, we know that a person isnt made righteous by the works of the Law but rather through the faithfulness of Jesus Christ. We ourselves believed in Christ Jesus so that we could be made righteous by the faithfulness of Christ and not by the works of the Law—because no one will be made righteous by the works of the Law.
local: Nì míǹ kɔkɔee, ti nyí yii ti nín fōō Yeesu Kriisitoo ki kííyee di yàntī ti kpántí deedeedambi Unimbɔti nimbiin, an kaa sá Mooyiisi marab ŋúbitam pu. Ti mun fōō Yeesu Kriisitoo ki kíí ní ki kpántì deedeedambi dimákal din ti cáá Kriisitoo puee, kaa sá marabee ŋúbitam pu. Di sá yii báà ubɔ kaa ŋūǹ kí kpántí deedeedaan Unimbɔti nimbiin nì marab ŋúbitam pu.

eng: But if it is discovered that we ourselves are sinners while we are trying to be made righteous in Christ, then is Christ a servant of sin? Absolutely not!.
local: Ti nín nyàab̀ kí kpántí deedeedambi Kriisitoo puee, ti béè yii timbi mun sá binikpitib dee. Mimmee Kriisitoo yàntī tikpitil wīintáaa? Aayee, kpataaa!.

eng: If I rebuild the very things that I tore down, I show that I myself am breaking the Law.
local: Ama, m yaa fātìi máń kun m nìn gbáń ki wīīyee, m kpántì uyintil dee m-ba.

eng: I died to the Law through the Law, so that I could live for God.
local: Di sá yii marabee yāntì m kpíì ki nyáń marab taapu, kí ŋmā kí nīn bí ki tīī Unimbɔti. Man nì Kriisitoo di kpáfì ki kpíì ndɔpuntikaa pu.

eng: I went there because of a revelation, and I laid out the gospel that I preach to the Gentiles for them. But I did it privately with the influential leaders to make sure that I wouldnt be working or that I hadnt worked for nothing.
local: An sá Unimbɔti di nìn lēē ki dàkā-mi yii ḿ cù ní m cūtì. Ní m gāntì Kriisitoo nikitil kpilib ki kàan̄ ki tùkū-bi Tibɔmɔntiil tin m sòoǹ bin kaa sá Juuda yabee kansikinee. Maa là ditundi din m túńee nì din m bíi tūǹee ń ŋá fám.

eng: I have been crucified with Christ and I no longer live, but Christ lives in me. And the life that I now live in my body, I live by faith, indeed, by the faithfulness of Gods Son, who loved me and gave himself for me.
local: M nín bí nee, kaa ti sá man di bí, Kriisitoo di bí m-ni. M nín bí dimaŋfalinee, Unimbɔti Jipɔɔn ní m fōō ki kíí, úǹ di néeń-mi ki dū u-ba ki tīī man pu.

eng: I dont ignore the grace of God, because if we become righteous through the Law, then Christ died for no purpose.
local: Maa kpèé Unimbɔti ŋanti fám. An yaa bàà sá Mooyiisi marab ŋúbitam pu ní unil dì kí kpántí deedeedaan Unimbɔti nimbiinee, mimmee Kriisitoo kpíì fám deeyaa.

eng: However, not even Titus, who was with me and who was a Greek, was required to be circumcised.
local: Ní baa páb́ Tiiti un sá Greeki, m-tɔntɔnjutee yii ú gíí dikpancandi.

eng: But false brothers and sisters, who were brought in secretly, slipped in to spy on our freedom, which we have in Christ Jesus, and to make us slaves.
local: Ama biba dɔ́miń ki ŋmālim̀ ti-kansikin ki mɔ́ntì yii bi sá ti-nabiyaamu ama ní kaa sá. Bíǹ di bàà là ú gíí. An nibee ŋá soooo ki kɔ́ ti-kansikin kí cɔ̄ŋkì kí kpèè dibatɔl din ti cáá Yeesu Kriisitoonee, kí ŋmā kí gíiǹ-ti kuyuŋun.

eng: We didnt give in and submit to them for a single moment, so that the truth of the gospel would continue to be with you.
local: Taa pée pú-bi mpaan ŋyunti ŋubɔ poon báà fiii, Tibɔmɔntiil baamɔŋyi ń nīn bí ki tīī-ni.

eng: The influential leaders didnt add anything to what I was preaching—and whatever they were makes no difference to me, because God doesnt show favoritism.
local: An yaa kíǹ bin bi yíì binikpaambee - bi yaa sá biŋyee, man ceeyee an kaa páb́, kun puee Unimbɔti kaa gàntī binib -, binikpaambi kaa kútì tibɔti tiba Tibɔmɔntiil tin m sòoǹee pu.

eng: But on the contrary, they saw that I had been given the responsibility to preach the gospel to the people who arent circumcised, just as Peter had been to the circumcised.
local: Áli gba, bi ká yii Unimbɔti dū bin kaa sá Juuda yabee ki ŋúbiǹ-mi ḿ sòoǹ nì bi Tibɔmɔntiil, kii u nín dū bin sá Juuda yabee ki ŋúbiǹ Peetroo puee.

eng: The one who empowered Peter to become an apostle to the circumcised empowered me also to be one to the Gentiles.
local: Di sá yii Unimbɔti un yāntì Peetroo kpántì Yeesu kpambal Juuda yab kansikinee di yāntì ma mun kpántì u-kpambal bin kaa sá Juuda yabee kansikin.

eng: James, Cephas, and John, who are considered to be key leaders, shook hands with me and Barnabas as equals when they recognized the grace that was given to me. So it was agreed that we would go to the Gentiles, while they continue to go to the people who were circumcised.
local: Ní Yakubu nì Peetroo nì Yoowaneesi, bin pu bi nyí yii bi sá Kriisitoo nikitil kpilibee, béè yii Unimbɔti di pú-mi an pɔŋŋu. Bi nìn tīī man nì Baarnaabaasi kuboou ki dàkā yii ti-kɔkɔ ŋá ubaanti, timbi ń cù bin kaa sá Juuda yabee cee, bíǹ ń cù Juuda yab cee.

eng: You irrational Galatians! Who put a spell on you? Jesus Christ was put on display as crucified before your eyes!.
local: Galaati yab bigbaambi, ŋma di gátì ni-nimbiliŋ ní? Di sá yii bi nìn kàan̄ Yeesu Kriisitoo kúm ndɔpuntikaa pu bɔti, ní ni wál̀ míǹ kii foota ní bi dàkā-nee.

eng: All those who rely on the works of the Law are under a curse, because it is written, Everyone is cursed who does not keep on doing all the things that have been written in the Law scroll .
local: Ama, mbusu bí ki tīī un là kí dī Mooyiisi marab pu kí ŋmátée, kun puee an ŋmàn̄ yii: «Tin kɔkɔwoooo bi ŋmàn̄ marab gbɔŋku poon bí nīn ŋáańee, un sá kamaa yaa kaa ŋúb́ mimmee, mbusu bí ki tīī udaan.».

eng: But since no one is made righteous by the Law as far as God is concerned, it is clear that the righteous one will live on the basis of faith .
local: Ní an cántì ki tùkū-ti yii ubɔ kaa ŋūǹ kí ŋúb́ marab kí kpántí deedeedaan Unimbɔti nimbiin. Di sá an lī yii: «Deedeedaan kāntí dimaŋfal u-fookiiu pu ní.».

eng: The Law isnt based on faith; rather, the one doing these things will live by them .
local: Marab nì fookii kaa sá ubaanti: di sá Unimbɔti gbɔŋku poon lī yii: «Un yaa ŋáań min Mooyiisi marab lēe kɔkɔee di ŋmátí.».

eng: Christ redeemed us from the curse of the Law by becoming a curse for us—because it is written, Everyone who is hung on a tree is cursed .
local: Ama Kriisitoo kpántì mbusudaan timbi pu ní ki nyántì-ti mbusu un marab cáańee poon, kii an nín ŋmàn̄ puee yii: «Un kamaa bi yaa lúntì busubu puee ń nīn sá-ni mbusudaan.».

eng: He redeemed us so that the blessing of Abraham would come to the Gentiles through Christ Jesus, and that we would receive the promise of the Spirit through faith.
local: An di yì-tì ní Yeesu Kriisitoo puee, bin kaa sá Juuda yabee kāntí dibiindi din Abraam nìn kée. Ti nín fōō Unimbɔti ki kíí puee di yì-tì ní ti fòol̄ u-Fam min u nìn pōoǹee.

eng: Brothers and sisters, Ill use an example from human experience. No one ignores or makes additions to a validated will.
local: Nnabiyaamu, tí dū binib nín ŋáań puee kí ŋmàntīǹ tibɔti nee. Unil yaa bɔ́ntì u-bɔti ki ŋmàn̄ ki ŋá kugbɔŋun ki nyīī ŋŋal kii mara nín síiǹ puee, nì min kamaa an sá kinibiki di ŋée, ubɔ kaa ŋūǹ kí kpìtāaa, kaa tí ŋūǹ kí gbéeǹ tiba mun.

eng: The promises were made to Abraham and to his descendant. It doesnt say, and to the descendants, as if referring to many rather than just one. It says, and to your descendant, who is Christ.
local: Ní tin tin Unimbɔti nìn pōoǹ Abraamee, u nìn pōoǹ ki tīī u nì u-maaliŋu ní. Unimbɔti gbɔŋku poon kaa ŋmàn̄ yii, u nìn pōoǹ ki tīī Abraam biyaamu kupaau. U pée lī yii, u-maaliŋu, an dàkà yii u-maaliŋu poon unibaanti. Úǹ di sá Kriisitooyee.

eng: Im saying this: the Law, which came four hundred thirty years later, doesnt invalidate the agreement that was previously validated by God so that it cancels the promise.
local: Tin tin m là kí lèe taapu sɔ̀. Unimbɔti nìn bɔ́ntì u-bɔti ki sòon̄ ki síiǹ. Abin tilaafati tili nì mmuŋku nì saalaa boon ní Mooyiisi marab bāań. Marabee kaa ŋūǹ kí kpìtī Unimbɔti poondi kí yàntī dí ŋá fám.

eng: If the inheritance were based upon the Law, it would no longer be from the promise. But God has given it graciously to Abraham through a promise.
local: An yaa sá marab pu ní Unimbɔti dì ki tìì-ti u-gaajatee, mimmee an kaa sá u-poondi pu dee. Ama an sá Unimbɔti nín nìn pōoǹ Abraam yii u làá tīī-u tigaajatee ní u tīī-u.

eng: So why was the Law given? It was added because of offenses, until the descendant would come to whom the promise had been made. It was put in place through angels by the hand of a mediator.
local: Mimmee, ba pu ní bi yóoǹ marab? Unimbɔti dū marab ki kútì dipoondi pu binib ń béé ikpiti nín sá kuŋyee, ní marabee ń nīn bí ki cí ŋyunti ŋun Abraam maaliŋu poon yɔu un pu u pōoǹ dipoondee ń dāá bàńee. Unimbɔti tuuŋyi di cáań marab ki dūu tīī Mooyiisi, ní úǹ dūu nāatì Isirayeel yab.

eng: I just want to know this from you: Did you receive the Spirit by doing the works of the Law or by believing what you heard?.
local: M là kí bàlifì-ni tibɔbaantiil ní kíí-mi: ni nín ŋúb́ Mooyiisi marabee ní ni fōō Unimbɔti Fam naaa, ni nín fōō Tibɔmɔntiil ki kííyee ní ni fōō ní?.

eng: Now the mediator does not take one side; but God is one.
local: Unil yaa bí u-baba nì u-baba ki ŋá u-bɔtee, unàatil kaa bí, míǹ ní Unimbɔti u-baba di pōoǹ dipoondi.

eng: So, is the Law against the promises of God? Absolutely not! If a Law had been given that was able to give life, then righteousness would in fact have come from the Law.
local: Mimmee, Mooyiisi marab jáà nì Unimbɔti poondi deeyaaa? Aayee, kpataaa! Unimbɔti yaa nìn tīī marab bin pu binib ŋūǹ kí dī kí ŋmátée, binib bàà ŋūǹ kí kpántí deedeedambi Unimbɔti nimbiin marabee pu.

eng: But scripture locked up all things under sin, so that the promise based on the faithfulness of Jesus Christ might be given to those who have faith.
local: Ama Unimbɔti gbɔŋku poon bɔti tùkū-ti yii kitiŋ kɔkɔwoooo nib pīī ikpitin. Mimmee bin yaa fōō ki kííyee ŋūǹ kí fōō tin Unimbɔti pōoǹee, bi nín fōō Yeesu Kriisitoo ki kííyee pu.

eng: Before faith came, we were guarded under the Law, locked up until faith that was coming would be revealed.
local: Kí wàatī fookii yuntiŋu ń bàńee, ti nìn pīī marab sarkaun ki cí fookii ń bàń.

eng: so that the Law became our custodian until Christ so that we might be made righteous by faith.
local: Marab di nìn cí-ti ki tin sāā ŋyunti ŋun Kriisitoo dāa bāańee, án nín làá ŋá pu tí ŋmā kí kpántí deedeedambi Unimbɔti nimbiin fookii puee.

eng: But now that faith has come, we are no longer under a custodian.
local: Fookii nín bāańee, marab kaa ti cí-ti.

eng: You are all Gods children through faith in Christ Jesus.
local: Kun puee ni nín fōō Yeesu Kriisitoo ki kííyee pu ní ni-kɔkɔ kpántì Unimbɔti biyaamu.

eng: All of you who were baptized into Christ have clothed yourselves with Christ.
local: Di sá yii nimbi bin kɔkɔ bi fùl̄ Unimbɔti nyim, ni ŋá ubaanti nì Yeesu Kriisitooyee, ni kpántì kii Kriisitoo nín bí puee dee.

eng: There is neither Jew nor Greek; there is neither slave nor free; nor is there male and female, for you are all one in Christ Jesus.
local: Digàntil kaa ti bí Juuda yab nì bin kaa sá Juuda yabee kansikin, kaa ti bí bin sá iyumbuee nì bin tɔ́ bi-bee kansikin, kaa tí bí bininjab nì binimpoobi mun kansikin. Nimbi kɔkɔ kpáfì ubaanti Yeesu Kriisitoo pu ní.

eng: Now if you belong to Christ, then indeed you are Abrahams descendants, heirs according to the promise.
local: Kii ni nín sá Kriisitoo yabee puee, ni kpántì Abraam maaliŋu poon yab ki ŋūǹ kí fōō tigaajati tin Unimbɔti nìn pōoǹee.

eng: Are you so irrational? After you started with the Spirit, are you now finishing up with your own human effort?.
local: Ni sá bigbaambi níii? Ni kíĺ nì Unimbɔti Fam ki dī u-saŋŋu ní ki là kí kúntí nì ni-ba pɔ́ɔǹtamaaa?.

eng: Did you experience so much for nothing? I wonder if it really was for nothing.
local: Mimmee, tin kɔkɔ ni kántèe ŋá fám deeyaa! An kaa ŋūǹ kí ŋá fám.

eng: So does the one providing you with the Spirit and working miracles among you do this by you doing the works of the Law or by you believing what you heard?.
local: Unimbɔti nín tìì-ni u-Fam ki ŋáań maamaacib ni-kansikinee, an sá ni nín ŋúb̀ Mooyiisi marabee pueeyaaa, ni nín fōō Tibɔmɔntiilee puee ní?.

eng: Understand that in the same way that Abraham believed God and it was credited to him as righteousness, .
local: Míǹ ní an sòon̄ Abraam pu yii: «Abraam nìn fōō Unimbɔti ki kíí, ní Unimbɔti ká u-fookiiu un u cáá u-puee, ní ki yíiń-u deedeedaan.».

eng: those who believe are the children of Abraham.
local: Ní béé yii bin fōō Unimbɔti ki kííyee di sá Abraam biyaamu.

eng: But when it saw ahead of time that God would make the Gentiles righteous on the basis of faith, scripture preached the gospel in advance to Abraham: All the Gentiles will be blessed in you .
local: An lī Unimbɔti gbɔŋku poon dooooyee ki síiǹ, yii anibul ŋin kaa sá Juuda yabee nín fōō Unimbɔti ki kíí puee ní Unimbɔti kpántí-bi deedeedambi. An pu ní u nìn tùkū Abraam tibɔmɔntiil nee dooooyee yii: «Unimbɔti làá dī sii pu ní kí bìin̄ anibul ŋin kɔkɔ bí kitiŋ puee pu.».

eng: Therefore, those who believe are blessed together with Abraham who believed.
local: Mimmee, bin kɔkɔ fōō Unimbɔti ki kííyee kāntí dibiindi kii Abraam nín nìn fōō kí kíí ki ká dibiindi puee ní.

eng: Im saying that as long as the heirs are minors, they are no different from slaves, though they really are the owners of everything.
local: M làá tí yòon̄ tibɔŋmantikaal tiba. Di sá yii un làá fōō u-baa gaajawantee yaa dáá sá kibikee, baa ŋūǹ kí gàntī u nì uyumbu, ama u mun di yì tikɔkɔ.

eng: You observe religious days and months and seasons and years.
local: Ni gàntī iwiin iba yii i sá ikpaan, ki gàntī iŋmal nì iyunti nì abin mbaantiim.

eng: Im afraid for you! Perhaps my hard work for you has been for nothing.
local: An puee, m fàŋkí yii digìńdi din m gīī ni-puee ń taa ŋá fám.

eng: I beg you to be like me, brothers and sisters, because I have become like you! You havent wronged me.
local: Nnabiyaamu, m mèé-ni yii ní nīn bímaan kii mamee, a lì kii ma mun nín nìn gíiǹ m-ba kii nimbee. Ama naa ŋá-mi tibeeee!.

eng: You know that I first preached the gospel to you because of an illness.
local: Ni nyí yii m-weeŋyi di nìn yāntì m sòon̄ nì ni Tibɔmɔntiil mpeepeekaam.

eng: Though my poor health burdened you, you didnt look down on me or reject me, but you welcomed me as if I were an angel from God, or as if I were Christ Jesus!.
